<!-- ============ 5. TASK MODEL ============ -->
<section id="task-model">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="step-indicator">
        <div class="step-number">5</div>
        <span class="step-label">Task Model</span>
      </div>
      <h2>Task Structure</h2>
      <p class="section-desc">Every task in HHP carries the same core fields &mdash; consistent across Internal Ops, Client Execution, and Sales.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="task-mock-wrapper">
      <div class="card task-mock">
        <div class="task-mock-header">
          <i data-lucide="check-square"></i>
          Publish weekly KOL report for Client X
        </div>
        <div class="task-mock-body">
          <div class="task-field"><span class="field-label">Assignee</span><span class="field-value">Sarah K.</span></div>
          <div class="task-field"><span class="field-label">Due Date</span><span class="field-value">Mar 21, 2026</span></div>
          <div class="task-field"><span class="field-label">Priority</span><span class="field-value"><span class="tag tag-red">High</span></span></div>
          <div class="task-field"><span class="field-label">Status</span><span class="field-value"><span class="tag tag-blue">In Progress</span></span></div>
          <div class="task-field"><span class="field-label">Frequency</span><span class="field-value"><span class="tag tag-teal">Weekly</span></span></div>
          <div class="task-field"><span class="field-label">Task Type</span><span class="field-value"><span class="tag tag-amber">Delivery</span></span></div>
          <div class="task-field"><span class="field-label">Link</span><span class="field-value" style="color:var(--blue)">docs.google.com/...</span></div>
          <div class="task-field"><span class="field-label">Attachments</span><span class="field-value">report_v3.pdf</span></div>
          <div class="task-field"><span class="field-label">Recurring</span><span class="field-value"><span class="tag tag-green">Every Monday</span></span></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="task-fields-desc">
        <h4>Required Fields on Every Task</h4>
        <div class="field-row"><strong>Assignee</strong> <span>Who is responsible. Single or multi-assign.</span></div>
        <div class="field-row"><strong>Due Date</strong> <span>Date + optional time. Triggers overdue alerts.</span></div>
        <div class="field-row"><strong>Priority</strong> <span>Urgent / High / Medium / Low. Drives sort order.</span></div>
        <div class="field-row"><strong>Status</strong> <span>To Do &rarr; In Progress &rarr; Review &rarr; Done.</span></div>
        <div class="field-row"><strong>Frequency</strong> <span>Custom field. One-time, Daily, Weekly, Monthly.</span></div>
        <div class="field-row"><strong>Task Type</strong> <span>Custom field. Delivery, Research, Internal, Sales.</span></div>
        <div class="field-row"><strong>Link</strong> <span>External reference URL (Google Docs, sheets, etc.)</span></div>
        <div class="field-row"><strong>Attachments</strong> <span>File uploads with preview. PDFs, images, docs.</span></div>
        <div class="field-row"><strong>Comments</strong> <span>Threaded discussion with @mentions.</span></div>
        <div class="field-row"><strong>Recurring</strong> <span>Auto-recreates task on schedule.</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="section-divider"><hr/></div>

<!-- ============ 6. ACCOUNTABILITY ============ -->
<section id="accountability">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="step-indicator">
        <div class="step-number">6</div>
        <span class="step-label">Improvement Over ClickUp</span>
      </div>
      <h2>Accountability Enhancements</h2>
      <p class="section-desc">Fixes the ClickUp problem of "tasks completed but not marked done." These are behavior-correcting systems, not just features.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="acc-grid">
      <div class="card acc-card card-pad">
        <div class="icon-box" style="background:#fef2f2">
          <i data-lucide="bell-ring" style="color:var(--red)"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h4>Overdue TG Bot Alert</h4>
          <p>Auto-notification via Telegram bot when any task passes its due date. Immediate visibility &mdash; no need to open the app.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="card acc-card card-pad">
        <div class="icon-box" style="background:#eff6ff">
          <i data-lucide="bar-chart-3" style="color:var(--blue)"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h4>Weekly Incomplete Task Report</h4>
          <p>Automated report sent to each team member showing overdue and stale tasks. Admin dashboard mirrors this data.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="card acc-card card-pad">
        <div class="icon-box" style="background:#fffbeb">
          <i data-lucide="clock" style="color:var(--amber)"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h4>7-Day Stale Rule</h4>
          <p>No task can sit "In Progress" for more than 7 days without a comment or status update. Flagged automatically on dashboards.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="card acc-card card-pad">
        <div class="icon-box" style="background:#f0fdf4">
          <i data-lucide="circle-check" style="color:var(--green)"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h4>Friday Auto-Summary</h4>
          <p>"Tasks completed this week per team member" &mdash; sent every Friday. Creates positive accountability and transparency.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="section-divider"><hr/></div>

<!-- ============ 7. MIGRATION PHASES ============ -->
<section id="phases">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="step-indicator">
        <div class="step-number">7</div>
        <span class="step-label">Rollout</span>
      </div>
      <h2>Migration Phases</h2>
      <p class="section-desc">A controlled, phased migration that never puts active campaigns at risk. Parallel run before any hard cutover.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="timeline">
      <div class="phase">
        <div class="phase-marker c0">0</div>
        <div class="phase-content">
          <div class="phase-head">
            <span class="phase-title">Feature Parity Audit</span>
            <span class="phase-duration">Week 1</span>
          </div>
          <div class="phase-body">
            Before moving anything, confirm HHP can support every non-negotiable:
            <ul>
              <li>Recurring tasks &amp; automation triggers</li>
              <li>Auto-assign &amp; reminders</li>
              <li>Form &rarr; task creation</li>
              <li>Full status pipeline replication</li>
            </ul>
            <div class="phase-callout warning">If any item fails &rarr; migration pauses until resolved. No workarounds.</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="phase">
        <div class="phase-marker c1">1</div>
        <div class="phase-content">
          <div class="phase-head">
            <span class="phase-title">Parallel Run</span>
            <span class="phase-duration">Weeks 2 &ndash; 4</span>
          </div>
          <div class="phase-body">
            Do <strong>NOT</strong> hard switch. Run both systems simultaneously.
            <ul>
              <li><strong>New tasks</strong> created in HHP only</li>
              <li><strong>Old tasks</strong> continue in ClickUp (no new additions)</li>
              <li>Monitor: friction, missing features, behavioral gaps</li>
            </ul>
            <div class="phase-callout">Rule: HHP = new work &bull; ClickUp = legacy work only</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="phase">
        <div class="phase-marker c2">2</div>
        <div class="phase-content">
          <div class="phase-head">
            <span class="phase-title">Active Task Migration</span>
            <span class="phase-duration">Week 5</span>
          </div>
          <div class="phase-body">
            Only migrate what's alive:
            <ul>
              <li>Active client tasks</li>
              <li>Recurring weekly tasks</li>
              <li>Open sales tasks</li>
            </ul>
            <div class="phase-callout">Do NOT migrate: completed tasks, archived history, closed campaigns. Historical access stays in ClickUp (read-only).</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="phase">
        <div class="phase-marker c3">3</div>
        <div class="phase-content">
          <div class="phase-head">
            <span class="phase-title">Automation Replication</span>
            <span class="phase-duration">Week 6</span>
          </div>
          <div class="phase-body">
            Rebuild all automation behavior in HHP:
            <ul>
              <li>Status change triggers</li>
              <li>Reminder logic &amp; auto-assign rules</li>
              <li>Recurring weekly updates</li>
              <li>Form &rarr; task logic</li>
            </ul>
            <div class="phase-callout">Automations should be behavior-correcting, not just duplicating ClickUp logic. Build in the accountability improvements from Step 6.</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="phase">
        <div class="phase-marker c4">4</div>
        <div class="phase-content">
          <div class="phase-head">
            <span class="phase-title">Hard Cutover</span>
            <span class="phase-duration">Week 7+</span>
          </div>
          <div class="phase-body">
            Only proceed when <strong>all gates pass</strong>:
            <ul>
              <li>All active tasks exist in HHP</li>
              <li>Recurring tasks confirmed working</li>
              <li>Automations verified end-to-end</li>
              <li>All three dashboards stable</li>
            </ul>
            <div class="phase-callout success">Lock ClickUp (no editing) &bull; Announce HHP as sole operational system &bull; Remove ClickUp from daily workflow</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="section-divider"><hr/></div>

<!-- ============ 8. READINESS ============ -->
<section id="readiness">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="step-indicator">
        <div class="step-number">8</div>
        <span class="step-label">Gate Check</span>
      </div>
      <h2>Minimum Requirements Before Cutover</h2>
      <p class="section-desc">Every item below must be confirmed working in HHP. If any single item fails, the migration stays paused.</p>
    </div>

    <table class="ready-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th style="width:30%">Feature</th>
          <th style="width:18%">Status</th>
          <th>Implementation Notes</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr><td><strong>Assignees</strong></td><td><span class="status-badge required"><span class="status-dot"></span> Required</span></td><td>Single + multi-assignee support</td></tr>
        <tr><td><strong>Due Dates</strong></td><td><span class="status-badge required"><span class="status-dot"></span> Required</span></td><td>Date + time precision, triggers overdue alerts</td></tr>
        <tr><td><strong>Status Pipeline</strong></td><td><span class="status-badge required"><span class="status-dot"></span> Required</span></td><td>Custom statuses per workspace category</td></tr>
        <tr><td><strong>Recurring Tasks</strong></td><td><span class="status-badge required"><span class="status-dot"></span> Required</span></td><td>Weekly, bi-weekly, monthly cycles</td></tr>
        <tr><td><strong>Automations</strong></td><td><span class="status-badge required"><span class="status-dot"></span> Required</span></td><td>Status triggers, auto-assign, reminders</td></tr>
        <tr><td><strong>Form &rarr; Task</strong></td><td><span class="status-badge required"><span class="status-dot"></span> Required</span></td><td>External form submission creates internal task</td></tr>
        <tr><td><strong>Dashboard (per member)</strong></td><td><span class="status-badge required"><span class="status-dot"></span> Required</span></td><td>"My Work" equivalent with status grouping</td></tr>
        <tr><td><strong>Dashboard (admin)</strong></td><td><span class="status-badge required"><span class="status-dot"></span> Required</span></td><td>Team member + client oversight views</td></tr>
        <tr><td><strong>Attachments</strong></td><td><span class="status-badge required"><span class="status-dot"></span> Required</span></td><td>File upload, preview, download</td></tr>
        <tr><td><strong>Comments</strong></td><td><span class="status-badge required"><span class="status-dot"></span> Required</span></td><td>Threaded comments with @mentions</td></tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>

    <div class="blocker">
      <div class="blocker-icon">
        <i data-lucide="alert-triangle"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h4>Hard Blocker</h4>
        <p>Without all items confirmed working, migration is paused. No exceptions, no workarounds.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div style="height:4rem"></div>

<!-- ============ SCRIPTS ============ -->
<script>
  // Initialize Lucide icons
  lucide.createIcons();

  // Sticky nav visibility
  const nav = document.getElementById('stickyNav');
  const cover = document.querySelector('.cover');
  const sections = document.querySelectorAll('section[id]');
  const navLinks = nav.querySelectorAll('a');

  const observer = new IntersectionObserver(([entry]) => {
    nav.classList.toggle('visible', !entry.isIntersecting);
  }, { threshold: 0 });
  observer.observe(cover);

  // Active nav link on scroll
  const sectionObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        navLinks.forEach(a => a.classList.remove('active'));
        const active = nav.querySelector('a[href="#' + entry.target.id + '"]');
        if (active) active.classList.add('active');
      }
    });
  }, { rootMargin: '-30% 0px -70% 0px' });
  sections.forEach(s => sectionObserver.observe(s));
</script>
</body>
</html>
```

```text
Perfect! Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the task management system. Let me create a final summary document:

## Comprehensive Task Management System Summary

Based on my thorough exploration of the codebase, here's the complete breakdown of the task management system:

### **1. DATA MODEL (Task Fields/Columns)**

The `tasks` table stores the following fields:

```typescript
type Task = {
  id: string;                    // UUID primary key
  task_name: string;             // Task title (required)
  assigned_to: string | null;    // User ID of assignee
  assigned_to_name: string | null; // Cached assignee name
  due_date: string | null;       // Date in YYYY-MM-DD format
  latest_comment: string | null; // Single comment/note field
  frequency: string;             // Recurrence type
  task_type: string;             // Category/classification
  link: string | null;           // URL reference
  description: string | null;    // Rich text HTML (via Quill)
  status: string;                // Current workflow status
  created_by: string | null;     // Creator user ID
  created_by_name: string | null; // Cached creator name
  sort_order: number;            // Manual ordering priority
  created_at: string;            // Timestamp
  updated_at: string;            // Timestamp
}
```

**Key Design Note**: Names are denormalized (cached) as `assigned_to_name` and `created_by_name` to avoid N+1 queries.

---

### **2. TASK STATUSES**

Five distinct workflow statuses are supported:

| Status | Label | Icon | Color | Use Case |
|--------|-------|------|-------|----------|
| `to_do` | To Do | Circle | Gray | Default, unstarted state |
| `in_progress` | In Progress | PlayCircle | Blue | Currently being worked on |
| `paused` | Paused | PauseCircle | Amber | Temporarily stopped |
| `ready_for_feedback` | Ready for Feedback | MessageCircle | Purple | Awaiting review/approval |
| `complete` | Complete | CheckCircle2 | Green | Finished work |

Status changes are immediately saved to the database via inline popover selection.

---

### **3. FREQUENCY/RECURRENCE SYSTEM**

Five frequency options control task repetition:

- **one-time**: Single occurrence (default for "One-Time" tab)
- **daily**: Every day
- **weekly**: Every week
- **monthly**: Every month
- **recurring**: Generic recurring (category for "Recurring" tab)

**Important**: The frequency field is **metadata only** - there's **NO automatic recurrence engine** visible in the code. The system doesn't automatically create new instances; frequency appears to be informational for filtering/organization only.

---

### **4. TASK TYPES/CATEGORIES**

Nine predefined task types for classification:

1. Admin & Operations (slate)
2. Finance & Invoicing (emerald)
3. General (gray)
4. Tech & Tools (blue)
5. Marketing & Sales (pink)
6. Client SOP (amber)
7. Client Delivery (cyan)
8. Performance Review (violet)
9. Research & Analytics (indigo)

Each has distinct badge colors for visual identification.

---

### **5. ASSIGNMENT SYSTEM**

**How Assignment Works:**
- Tasks are assigned via `assigned_to` field (stores user ID)
- Assignee name is cached in `assigned_to_name` 
- Can be unassigned (null value)
- Fetches assignable team members from `users` table filtered by role != 'client'
- **Key Feature**: Automatic UI grouping by assigned user with collapsible sections

**Assignee UI**:
- Group header shows assignee avatar (from `profile_photo_url`) or initials
- Shows count of tasks per person
- "Unassigned" group appears at bottom
- Each user gets a unique color scheme (10 color options cycle)

---

### **6. RECURRING TASKS**

**Current Implementation**: Limited/Metadata-Only

The system supports:
- Frequency field (daily, weekly, monthly, etc.) for classification
- Filtering into "Recurring" vs "One-Time" tabs
- Display of frequency badges on each task

**What's Missing**:
- No automatic recurrence engine visible
- No scheduling logic to generate new instances
- No recurrence rule patterns (e.g., "every Monday")
- No recurrence end dates
- Appears to be a placeholder for future automation

---

### **7. AUTOMATIONS/TRIGGERS**

**Current Status**: Not visible in the codebase

The tasks system is **purely manual**:
- No visible automation rules
- No action triggers
- No workflow automations
- No task templates for bulk creation
- The "Automated Workflows" table exists in the `sql/migrations` directory but is separate from the tasks system

---

### **8. AVAILABLE DASHBOARDS/VIEWS**

### **Primary Tabs:**
1. **One-Time Tab**: Filters by `frequency != 'one-time' AND task_type != 'Client SOP'`
2. **Recurring Tab**: Filters by `frequency = 'daily'|'weekly'|'monthly'|'recurring' AND task_type != 'Client SOP'`
3. **Client SOP Tab**: Filters by `task_type = 'Client SOP'` (separate workspace scope)

Each tab shows live count badges.

### **Grouping:**
- Tasks automatically grouped by `assigned_to` with collapsible headers
- Unassigned tasks in separate "Unassigned" group
- Groups can be collapsed/expanded individually
- Sorting within groups by `sort_order`

### **Columns (Customizable):**
- Task Name
- Due Date (with calendar picker, color-coded urgency)
- Latest Comment
- Frequency (badge with color)
- Type (badge with color)
- Link (clickable external link)
- Created By (with avatar + name tooltip)
- Created (date only)

**Column Customization**: Column order is persisted to localStorage (`tasks-column-order`) and can be reordered via drag-and-drop.

---

### **9. CHECKLIST/SUBTASK SUPPORT**

**Not Implemented**

The system does not support:
- Subtasks/sub-items
- Progress tracking within a task
- Item checklists
- Completion percentage

---

### **10. COMMENT SYSTEM**

**Simple Comment Support**:
- Single `latest_comment` field per task (not threaded)
- Free-form text or multiline
- Editable inline (double-click to edit)
- No nested comments or discussion threads
- No comment history/audit trail

---

### **11. ATTACHMENT SUPPORT**

**Not Implemented**

Tasks support a `link` field for external references but no file attachments:
- No file uploads
- No storage integration
- Only external URL links allowed

---

### **12. OVERALL ARCHITECTURE**

### **Technology Stack:**
- **Frontend**: Next.js 14+ (React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS)
- **Component Library**: shadcn/ui components (Button, Dialog, Tabs, Popover, etc.)
- **Rich Text Editor**: React Quill (for descriptions)
- **Backend**: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- **State Management**: React hooks (useState, useMemo, useCallback)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom color schemes

### **Code Structure:**
- **Location**: `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/tasks/page.tsx` (1,375 lines)
- **Pattern**: Monolithic client component (no separate service layer)
- **Layout**: `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/tasks/layout.tsx`

### **Key Architectural Features:**

1. **Inline Editing**: Double-click cells to edit most fields without modal dialogs
2. **Real-time Updates**: Changes save immediately to database on blur/select
3. **Reorderable Interface**:
   - Rows can move up/down within filtered view
   - Columns can be reordered via drag-and-drop
   - Sort order stored per task
4. **Modal Forms**: Add/Edit dialog for bulk changes or initial creation
5. **Optimistic UI**: Local state updates before database confirmation
6. **Search**: Full-text search across task_name, assigned_to_name, latest_comment, task_type, created_by_name

### **CRUD Operations:**

| Operation | Method | Location |
|-----------|--------|----------|
| **Create** | Modal dialog + insert to `tasks` table | `handleSubmit()` |
| **Read** | Fetch all tasks on mount, filter/group in memory | `fetchTasks()` |
| **Update** | Inline editing (double-click) or modal form | `saveInlineEdit()`, `saveSelectField()`, `saveDateField()` |
| **Delete** | Confirmation dialog | `handleDelete()` |

---

### **13. RELATED FEATURES**

### **Daily Standup Integration:**
- Separate `daily_standups` table for team check-ins
- Located at `/app/daily-standup/page.tsx`
- Captures: priorities, blockers, output goals, completion status
- Related but distinct from task management

### **Workspace Visibility:**
- Tasks marked as part of "Workspace" section in sidebar
- Currently visible only to Andy (test feature)
- Part of broader workspace/team section

---

### **14. DATA PERSISTENCE & TIMESTAMPS**

- All changes sync to Supabase `tasks` table in real-time
- `updated_at` field auto-updates on every change
- `created_at` immutable timestamp
- Dates stored as YYYY-MM-DD strings in local timezone (avoiding UTC offset issues)

---

### **SUMMARY TABLE**

| Feature | Status | Notes |
|---------|--------|-------|
| CRUD Operations | ✅ Full | Create, read, update (inline + modal), delete |
| Statuses | ✅ 5 types | To Do, In Progress, Paused, Ready for Feedback, Complete |
| Assignment | ✅ Yes | By user, grouped UI |
| Due Dates | ✅ Yes | Calendar picker, color-coded urgency (red/amber) |
| Recurrence | ⚠️ Metadata only | Frequency field for filtering, no auto-generation |
| Automations | ❌ None | Manual workflow only |
| Rich Descriptions | ✅ Yes | Quill HTML editor |
| Comments | ✅ Limited | Single comment field per task |
| Attachments | ❌ No | URL links only |
| Subtasks/Checklists | ❌ No | Not supported |
| Column Customization | ✅ Yes | Drag-to-reorder, localStorage persisted |
| Search/Filter | ✅ Yes | Full-text search + tab filters |
| Inline Editing | ✅ Yes | Double-click most cells |
| Reordering | ✅ Yes | Manual up/down buttons |

This is a **lightweight, manual task management system** designed for team coordination with emphasis on simplicity, real-time updates, and flexible UI customization. It's suitable for small teams managing SOPs, recurring work, and client deliverables, but lacks advanced features like auto-recurrence, subtasks, and complex workflows.

    96→const STATUS_CONFIG: Record<string, { label: string; icon: typeof Circle; color: string; bg: string }> = {
    97→  to_do: { label: 'To Do', icon: Circle, color: 'text-gray-400', bg: 'hover:bg-gray-100' },
    98→  in_progress: { label: 'In Progress', icon: PlayCircle, color: 'text-blue-500', bg: 'hover:bg-blue-50' },
    99→  paused: { label: 'Paused', icon: PauseCircle, color: 'text-amber-500', bg: 'hover:bg-amber-50' },
   100→  ready_for_feedback: { label: 'Ready for Feedback', icon: MessageCircle, color: 'text-purple-500', bg: 'hover:bg-purple-50' },
   101→  complete: { label: 'Complete', icon: CheckCircle2, color: 'text-green-500', bg: 'hover:bg-green-50' },
   102→};
   103→
   104→const frequencyBadge = (freq: string) => {
   105→  switch (freq) {
   106→    case 'one-time': return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
   107→    case 'daily': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800';
   108→    case 'weekly': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800';
   109→    case 'monthly': return 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800';
   110→    case 'recurring': return 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-800';
   111→    default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
   112→  }
   113→};
   114→
   115→const typeBadge = (type: string) => {
   116→  switch (type) {
   117→    case 'Admin & Operations': return 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-700';
   118→    case 'Finance & Invoicing': return 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800';
   119→    case 'General': return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
   120→    case 'Tech & Tools': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800';
   121→    case 'Marketing & Sales': return 'bg-pink-100 text-pink-800';
   122→    case 'Client SOP': return 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-800';
   123→    case 'Client Delivery': return 'bg-cyan-100 text-cyan-800';
   124→    case 'Performance Review': return 'bg-violet-100 text-violet-800';
   125→    case 'Research & Analytics': return 'bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-800';
   126→    default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
   127→  }
   128→};
   129→
   130→const getDueDateColor = (dueDate: string | null) => {
   131→  if (!dueDate) return '';
   132→  const today = new Date();
   133→  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
   134→  const due = new Date(dueDate + 'T00:00:00');
   135→  const diffDays = Math.ceil((due.getTime() - today.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   136→  if (diffDays < 0) return 'text-red-600 font-semibold';
   137→  if (diffDays <= 3) return 'text-amber-600 font-semibold';
   138→  return 'text-gray-600';
   139→};
   140→
   141→/** Format a Date to YYYY-MM-DD in local timezone (avoids UTC offset issues) */
   142→const toLocalDateString = (date: Date) => {
   143→  const year = date.getFullYear();
   144→  const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
   145→  const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
   146→  return `${year}-${month}-${day}`;
   147→};
   148→
   149→// Fixed column widths for consistency across all tables
   150→const COL: Record<string, string> = {
   151→  reorder: 'w-[50px]',
   152→  status: 'w-[36px]',
   153→  taskName: 'w-[22%] min-w-[180px]',
   154→  dueDate: 'w-[110px]',
   155→  comment: 'w-[14%] min-w-[100px]',
   156→  frequency: 'w-[100px]',
   157→  type: 'w-[140px]',
   158→  link: 'w-[80px]',
   159→  createdBy: 'w-[100px]',
   160→  created: 'w-[80px]',
   161→  actions: 'w-[80px]',
   162→};

   164→type ColumnKey = 'taskName' | 'dueDate' | 'comment' | 'frequency' | 'type' | 'link' | 'createdBy' | 'created';

   166→const COLUMN_DEFS: { key: ColumnKey; label: string }[] = [

   174→  { key: 'created', label: 'Created' },
   175→];
   176→
   177→const DEFAULT_COLUMN_ORDER: ColumnKey[] = COLUMN_DEFS.map(c => c.key);

   198→      const saved = localStorage.getItem(COLUMN_ORDER_KEY);
   199→      if (saved) {

   336→    }
   337→
   338→    const sortedKeys = Array.from(map.keys()).sort((a, b) => {
   339→      if (a === '_unassigned') return 1;
   340→      if (b === '_unassigned') return -1;
   341→      const nameA = map.get(a)![0].assigned_to_name || '';
   342→      const nameB = map.get(b)![0].assigned_to_name || '';
   343→      return nameA.localeCompare(nameB);
   344→    });
   345→
   346→    for (const key of sortedKeys) {
   347→      const tasks = map.get(key)!;
   348→      const label = key === '_unassigned' ? 'Unassigned' : (tasks[0].assigned_to_name || 'Unknown');

   350→    }
   351→
   352→    return groups;
   353→  }, [filtered]);

   507→  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
   508→    setDeletingId(null);
   509→    setTasks(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id !== id));
   510→    try {
   511→      await supabase.from('tasks').delete().eq('id', id);
   512→    } catch (error) {

   517→
   518→  // Global sorted list of all filtered tasks (used for reordering across groups)
   519→  const globalSorted = useMemo(() =>
   520→    [...filtered].sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order),
   521→    [filtered]
   522→  );
   523→
   524→  const handleReorder = async (taskId: string, direction: 'up' | 'down') => {
   525→    const idx = globalSorted.findIndex(t => t.id === taskId);
   526→    const swapIdx = direction === 'up' ? idx - 1 : idx + 1;
   527→    if (swapIdx < 0 || swapIdx >= globalSorted.length) return;
   528→
   529→    const current = globalSorted[idx];
   530→    const swap = globalSorted[swapIdx];
   531→
   532→    const currentOrder = current.sort_order;
   533→    const swapOrder = swap.sort_order;
   534→    const newCurrentOrder = currentOrder === swapOrder
   535→      ? (direction === 'up' ? swapOrder - 1 : swapOrder + 1)
   536→      : swapOrder;
   537→    const newSwapOrder = currentOrder === swapOrder
   538→      ? currentOrder
   539→      : currentOrder;
   540→
   541→    setTasks(prev => prev.map(t => {
   542→      if (t.id === current.id) return { ...t, sort_order: newCurrentOrder };
   543→      if (t.id === swap.id) return { ...t, sort_order: newSwapOrder };
   544→      return t;
   545→    }));
   546→
   547→    try {
   548→      await Promise.all([
   549→        supabase.from('tasks').update({ sort_order: newCurrentOrder }).eq('id', current.id),
   550→        supabase.from('tasks').update({ sort_order: newSwapOrder }).eq('id', swap.id),
   551→      ]);
   552→    } catch (error) {
   553→      console.error('Error reordering:', error);
   554→      await fetchTasks();
   555→    }
   556→  };
   557→
   558→  const handleAddNewRow = (groupKey: string) => {
   559→    // Expand the group if collapsed
   560→    if (collapsedUsers.has(groupKey)) {
   561→      setCollapsedUsers(prev => {
   562→        const newSet = new Set(prev);
   563→        newSet.delete(groupKey);
   564→        return newSet;
   565→      });
   566→    }
   567→    setAddingToGroup(groupKey);
   568→    setNewRowName('');
   569→  };
   570→
   571→  const handleSaveNewRow = async () => {
   572→    if (!addingToGroup || !newRowName.trim()) {
   573→      setAddingToGroup(null);
   574→      setNewRowName('');
   575→      return;
   576→    }
   577→
   578→    const groupKey = addingToGroup;
   579→    const name = newRowName.trim();
   580→    setAddingToGroup(null);
   581→    setNewRowName('');
   582→
   583→    if (!user?.id || !userProfile) return;
   584→
   585→    try {
   586→      const assignedTo = groupKey === '_unassigned' ? null : groupKey;
   587→      const assignedMember = assignedTo ? teamMembers.find(m => m.id === assignedTo) : null;
   588→      const defaultFrequency = activeTab === 'one-time' ? 'one-time' : activeTab === 'recurring' ? 'daily' : 'one-time';
   589→      const defaultType = activeTab === 'client-sop' ? 'Client SOP' : 'General';
   590→
   591→      const { error } = await supabase.from('tasks').insert({
   592→        task_name: name,
   593→        assigned_to: assignedTo,
   594→        assigned_to_name: assignedMember?.name || null,
   595→        frequency: defaultFrequency,
   596→        task_type: defaultType,
   597→        created_by: user.id,
   598→        created_by_name: userProfile.name || userProfile.email || 'Unknown',
   599→      });
   600→      if (error) throw error;
   601→      await fetchTasks();
   602→    } catch (err) {
   603→      console.error('Error adding task:', err);
   604→      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to add task.', variant: 'destructive' });
   605→    }
   606→  };
   607→
   608→  const formatDate = (dateStr: string) => {
   609→    return new Date(dateStr + 'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' });
   610→  };
   611→
   612→  const userColors = [
   613→    { bg: 'bg-blue-50', text: 'text-blue-700', border: 'border-blue-200' },
   614→    { bg: 'bg-emerald-50', text: 'text-emerald-700', border: 'border-emerald-200' },
   615→    { bg: 'bg-purple-50', text: 'text-purple-700', border: 'border-purple-200' },
   616→    { bg: 'bg-amber-50', text: 'text-amber-700', border: 'border-amber-200' },
   617→    { bg: 'bg-cyan-50', text: 'text-cyan-700', border: 'border-cyan-200' },
   618→    { bg: 'bg-pink-50', text: 'text-pink-700', border: 'border-pink-200' },
   619→    { bg: 'bg-indigo-50', text: 'text-indigo-700', border: 'border-indigo-200' },
   620→    { bg: 'bg-orange-50', text: 'text-orange-700', border: 'border-orange-200' },
   621→    { bg: 'bg-teal-50', text: 'text-teal-700', border: 'border-teal-200' },
   622→    { bg: 'bg-slate-50', text: 'text-slate-600', border: 'border-slate-200' },
   623→  ];
   624→
   625→  const getColorForIndex = (idx: number) => userColors[idx % userColors.length];
   626→
   627→  const getUserInitials = (name: string) => {
   628→    return name.split(' ').map(w => w[0]).join('').slice(0, 2).toUpperCase();
   629→  };
   630→
   631→  const colLabel: Record<ColumnKey, string> = {
   632→    taskName: 'Task Name', dueDate: 'Due Date', comment: 'Comment',
   633→    frequency: 'Frequency', type: 'Type', link: 'Link',
   634→    createdBy: 'Created By', created: 'Created',
   635→  };
   636→
   637→  const tableHeader = (
   638→    <thead>
   639→      <tr className="border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/80">
   640→        <th className={`text-left py-3 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider ${COL.reorder}`}></th>
   641→        <th className={`py-3 px-1 ${COL.status}`}></th>
   642→        {columnOrder.map((col) => (
   643→          <th
   644→            key={col}
   645→            className={`text-left py-3 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider ${COL[col]} cursor-grab select-none`}
   646→            draggable
   647→            onDragStart={() => handleColumnDragStart(col)}
   648→            onDragOver={(e) => handleColumnDragOver(e, col)}
   649→            onDrop={handleColumnDrop}
   650→          >
   651→            <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   652→              <GripVertical className="h-3 w-3 text-gray-300 flex-shrink-0" />
   653→              {colLabel[col]}
   654→            </div>
   655→          </th>
   656→        ))}
   657→        <th className={`text-right py-3 px-3 ${COL.actions}`}></th>
   658→      </tr>
   659→    </thead>
   660→  );
   661→
   662→  const renderCell = (task: Task, col: ColumnKey) => {
   663→    const isEditingField = (field: string) => editingCell?.taskId === task.id && editingCell?.field === field;
   664→
   665→    switch (col) {
   666→      case 'taskName':
   667→        return (
   668→          <td key={col} className={`py-3 px-3 ${COL.taskName}`}>
   669→            {isEditingField('task_name') ? (
   670→              <Input
   671→                value={editingValue}
   672→                onChange={(e) => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
   673→                onBlur={saveInlineEdit}
   674→                onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter') saveInlineEdit(); if (e.key === 'Escape') cancelEditing(); }}
   675→                className="w-full border-none shadow-none p-0 h-auto bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 text-sm font-medium text-gray-900"
   676→                style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   677→                autoFocus
   678→              />
   679→            ) : task.description && task.description !== '<p><br></p>' ? (
   680→              <TooltipProvider delayDuration={200}>
   681→                <Tooltip>
   682→                  <TooltipTrigger asChild>
   683→                    <span
   684→                      className="text-gray-900 font-medium line-clamp-2 cursor-pointer"
   685→                      onDoubleClick={() => startEditing(task.id, 'task_name', task.task_name)}
   686→                    >
   687→                      {task.task_name}
   688→                    </span>
   689→                  </TooltipTrigger>
   690→                  <TooltipContent side="bottom" align="start" className="max-w-xs text-xs">
   691→                    <div className="max-h-[200px] overflow-y-auto">
   692→                      <div className="prose prose-xs max-w-none [&_p]:m-0 [&_ul]:m-0 [&_ol]:m-0 [&_li]:m-0" dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: task.description }} />
   693→                    </div>
   694→                  </TooltipContent>
   695→                </Tooltip>
   696→              </TooltipProvider>
   697→            ) : (
   698→              <span
   699→                className="text-gray-900 font-medium line-clamp-2 cursor-pointer"
   700→                onDoubleClick={() => startEditing(task.id, 'task_name', task.task_name)}
   701→                title="Double-click to edit"
   702→              >
   703→                {task.task_name}
   704→              </span>
   705→            )}
   706→          </td>
   707→        );
   708→      case 'dueDate':
   709→        return (
   710→          <td key={col} className={`py-3 px-3 ${COL.dueDate}`}>
   711→            <Popover>
   712→              <PopoverTrigger asChild>
   713→                <button className={`text-sm hover:text-gray-700 cursor-pointer ${getDueDateColor(task.due_date) || 'text-gray-500'}`}>
   714→                  {task.due_date ? new Date(task.due_date + 'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' }) : '—'}
   715→                </button>
   716→              </PopoverTrigger>
   717→              <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-0" align="start">
   718→                <Calendar
   719→                  mode="single"
   720→                  selected={task.due_date ? new Date(task.due_date + 'T00:00:00') : undefined}
   721→                  onSelect={(date) => saveDateField(task.id, date)}
   722→                  initialFocus
   723→                  classNames={{ day_selected: 'text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white' }}
   724→                  modifiersStyles={{ selected: { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } }}
   725→                />
   726→              </PopoverContent>
   727→            </Popover>
   728→          </td>
   729→        );
   730→      case 'comment':
   731→        return (
   732→          <td key={col} className={`py-3 px-3 ${COL.comment}`}>
   733→            {isEditingField('latest_comment') ? (
   734→              <textarea
   735→                value={editingValue}
   736→                onChange={(e) => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
   737→                onBlur={saveInlineEdit}
   738→                onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Escape') cancelEditing(); }}
   739→                className="w-full min-w-[140px] border-none shadow-none p-0 bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 text-xs resize-none"
   740→                style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   741→                rows={2}
   742→                autoFocus
   743→              />
   744→            ) : (
   745→              <span
   746→                className="text-gray-600 line-clamp-2 whitespace-pre-wrap cursor-pointer text-xs"
   747→                onDoubleClick={() => startEditing(task.id, 'latest_comment', task.latest_comment || '')}
   748→                title="Double-click to edit"
   749→              >
   750→                {task.latest_comment || '—'}
   751→              </span>
   752→            )}
   753→          </td>
   754→        );
   755→      case 'frequency':
   756→        return (
   757→          <td key={col} className={`py-3 px-3 ${COL.frequency}`}>
   758→            <Select value={task.frequency} onValueChange={(v) => saveSelectField(task.id, 'frequency', v)}>
   759→              <SelectTrigger
   760→                className={`border-none shadow-none bg-transparent w-auto h-auto ${frequencyBadge(task.frequency)} px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium inline-flex items-center focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-none`}
   761→                style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   762→              >
   763→                <SelectValue />
   764→              </SelectTrigger>
   765→              <SelectContent>
   766→                {FREQUENCIES.map((f) => <SelectItem key={f} value={f}>{FREQUENCY_LABELS[f]}</SelectItem>)}
   767→              </SelectContent>
   768→            </Select>
   769→          </td>
   770→        );
   771→      case 'type':
   772→        return (
   773→          <td key={col} className={`py-3 px-3 ${COL.type}`}>
   774→            <Select value={task.task_type} onValueChange={(v) => saveSelectField(task.id, 'task_type', v)}>
   775→              <SelectTrigger
   776→                className={`border-none shadow-none bg-transparent w-auto max-w-full h-auto ${typeBadge(task.task_type)} px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium inline-flex items-center focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-none truncate`}
   777→                style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   778→              >
   779→                <SelectValue />
   780→              </SelectTrigger>
   781→              <SelectContent>
   782→                {TASK_TYPES.map((t) => <SelectItem key={t} value={t}>{t}</SelectItem>)}
   783→              </SelectContent>
   784→            </Select>
   785→          </td>
   786→        );
   787→      case 'link':
   788→        return (
   789→          <td key={col} className={`py-3 px-3 ${COL.link}`}>
   790→            {isEditingField('link') ? (
   791→              <Input
   792→                value={editingValue}
   793→                onChange={(e) => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
   794→                onBlur={saveInlineEdit}
   795→                onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter') saveInlineEdit(); if (e.key === 'Escape') cancelEditing(); }}
   796→                className="w-full border-none shadow-none p-0 h-auto bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 text-xs"
   797→                style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   798→                autoFocus
   799→              />
```
</details></tool-use>

  1073→  EnumName extends DefaultSchemaEnumNameOrOptions extends {
  1074→    schema: keyof DatabaseWithoutInternals
  1075→  }
  1076→    ? keyof DatabaseWithoutInternals[DefaultSchemaEnumNameOrOptions["schema"]]["Enums"]
  1077→    : never = never,
  1078→> = DefaultSchemaEnumNameOrOptions extends {
  1079→  schema: keyof DatabaseWithoutInternals
  1080→}
  1081→  ? DatabaseWithoutInternals[DefaultSchemaEnumNameOrOptions["schema"]]["Enums"][EnumName]
  1082→  : DefaultSchemaEnumNameOrOptions extends keyof DefaultSchema["Enums"]
  1083→    ? DefaultSchema["Enums"][DefaultSchemaEnumNameOrOptions]
  1084→    : never
  1085→
  1086→export type CompositeTypes<
  1087→  PublicCompositeTypeNameOrOptions extends
  1088→    | keyof DefaultSchema["CompositeTypes"]
  1089→    | { schema: keyof DatabaseWithoutInternals },
  1090→  CompositeTypeName extends PublicCompositeTypeNameOrOptions extends {
  1091→    schema: keyof DatabaseWithoutInternals
  1092→  }
  1093→    ? keyof DatabaseWithoutInternals[PublicCompositeTypeNameOrOptions["schema"]]["CompositeTypes"]
  1094→    : never = never,
  1095→> = PublicCompositeTypeNameOrOptions extends {
  1096→  schema: keyof DatabaseWithoutInternals
  1097→}
  1098→  ? DatabaseWithoutInternals[PublicCompositeTypeNameOrOptions["schema"]]["CompositeTypes"][CompositeTypeName]
  1099→  : PublicCompositeTypeNameOrOptions extends keyof DefaultSchema["CompositeTypes"]
  1100→    ? DefaultSchema["CompositeTypes"][PublicCompositeTypeNameOrOptions]
  1101→    : never
  1102→
  1103→export const Constants = {
  1104→  public: {
  1105→    Enums: {},
  1106→  },
  1107→} as const
  1108→

```text
     1→-- CRM Database Schema
     2→-- Core Tables: Opportunities (Leads+Deals), Partners, Affiliates, Contacts
     3→-- Supporting: Stage History for analytics
     4→
     5→-- ============================================
     6→-- 1. AFFILIATES TABLE (created first for FK reference)
     7→-- KOLs, referrers with rev-share or commission
     8→-- Lifecycle: New → Active → Inactive
     9→-- ============================================
    10→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_affiliates (
    11→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    12→
    13→  -- Basic Info
    14→  name TEXT NOT NULL,
    15→  affiliation TEXT, -- Their affiliation/company
    16→  category TEXT, -- Type of affiliate
    17→
    18→  -- Lifecycle
    19→  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new', -- 'new', 'active', 'inactive'
    20→
    21→  -- Commission
    22→  commission_model TEXT, -- Description of commission/rev-share structure
    23→  commission_rate DECIMAL, -- Percentage if applicable
    24→
    25→  -- Tracking
    26→  last_contacted_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    27→
    28→  -- Ownership
    29→  owner_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
    30→
    31→  -- Point of Contact (inline)
    32→  poc_name TEXT,
    33→  poc_email TEXT,
    34→  poc_telegram TEXT,
    35→
    36→  -- Notes
    37→  notes TEXT,
    38→
    39→  -- Timestamps
    40→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    41→  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
    42→);
    43→
    44→-- ============================================
    45→-- 2. OPPORTUNITIES TABLE (Unified Leads + Deals)
    46→-- Single pipeline: New → Contacted → Qualified → Proposal → Contract → Closed
    47→-- ============================================
    48→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_opportunities (
    49→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    50→
    51→  -- Basic Info
    52→  name TEXT NOT NULL,
    53→
    54→  -- Pipeline Stage (unified lead + deal stages)
    55→  stage TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new',
    56→  -- Lead stages: 'new', 'contacted', 'qualified', 'unqualified', 'nurture'
    57→  -- Deal stages: 'proposal', 'contract', 'closed_won', 'closed_lost'
    58→
    59→  -- Classification
    60→  account_type TEXT, -- 'general', 'channel', 'campaign', 'lite', 'ad_hoc' (set when qualified)
    61→
    62→  -- Value (set when becomes a deal)
    63→  deal_value DECIMAL,
    64→  currency TEXT DEFAULT 'USD',
    65→
    66→  -- Tracking
    67→  last_contacted_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    68→
    69→  -- Ownership & Source
    70→  owner_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
    71→  source TEXT, -- 'referral', 'inbound', 'event', 'cold_outreach'
    72→  referrer TEXT, -- Who referred them
    73→
    74→  -- Communication
    75→  gc TEXT, -- Group Chat link/info
    76→
    77→  -- Affiliate connection (for commission tracking)
    78→  affiliate_id UUID REFERENCES crm_affiliates(id),
    79→
    80→  -- Notes
    81→  notes TEXT,
    82→
    83→  -- Timestamps
    84→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    85→  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    86→  qualified_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, -- When moved from lead to deal stage
    87→  closed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE -- When won or lost
    88→);
    89→
    90→-- ============================================
    91→-- 3. PARTNERS TABLE
    92→-- BD relationships, cross-partnerships
    93→-- Lifecycle: Active / Inactive
    94→-- ============================================
    95→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_partners (
    96→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    97→
    98→  -- Basic Info
    99→  name TEXT NOT NULL,
   100→
   101→  -- Classification
   102→  category TEXT, -- 'service_provider', 'investor_vc', 'project', 'individual'
   103→  focus TEXT, -- Area of focus/expertise
   104→
   105→  -- Lifecycle
   106→  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', -- 'active', 'inactive'
   107→
   108→  -- Tracking
   109→  last_contacted_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
   110→
   111→  -- Ownership
   112→  owner_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
   113→
   114→  -- Point of Contact (inline)
   115→  poc_name TEXT,
   116→  poc_email TEXT,
   117→  poc_telegram TEXT,
   118→
   119→  -- Affiliate connection (if partner is also an affiliate)
   120→  is_affiliate BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
   121→  affiliate_id UUID REFERENCES crm_affiliates(id),
   122→
   123→  -- Notes
   124→  notes TEXT,
   125→
   126→  -- Timestamps
   127→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
   128→  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
   129→);
   130→
   131→-- ============================================
   132→-- 4. CONTACTS TABLE
   133→-- Individual people linked to opportunities/partners/affiliates
   134→-- ============================================
   135→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_contacts (
   136→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   137→
   138→  -- Basic Info
   139→  name TEXT NOT NULL,
   140→  email TEXT,
   141→  telegram_id TEXT,
   142→  x_id TEXT,
   143→  role TEXT, -- Their role/title
   144→  category TEXT, -- Contact category
   145→
   146→  -- Ownership
   147→  owner_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
   148→
   149→  -- Notes
   150→  notes TEXT,
   151→
   152→  -- Timestamps
   153→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
   154→  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
   155→);
   156→
   157→-- ============================================
   158→-- 5. CONTACT LINKS (Junction Table)
   159→-- Links contacts to opportunities/partners/affiliates
   160→-- ============================================
   161→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_contact_links (
   162→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   163→  contact_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES crm_contacts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   164→
   165→  -- Linked object type and ID
   166→  linked_type TEXT NOT NULL, -- 'opportunity', 'partner', 'affiliate'
   167→  opportunity_id UUID REFERENCES crm_opportunities(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   168→  partner_id UUID REFERENCES crm_partners(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   169→  affiliate_id UUID REFERENCES crm_affiliates(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   170→
   171→  -- Role in this relationship
   172→  role TEXT,
   173→  is_primary BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
   174→
   175→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
   176→
   177→  -- Ensure only one link type is set
   178→  CONSTRAINT check_single_link CHECK (
   179→    (CASE WHEN opportunity_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
   180→     CASE WHEN partner_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
   181→     CASE WHEN affiliate_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1
   182→  )
   183→);
   184→
   185→-- ============================================
   186→-- 6. STAGE HISTORY (For Analytics)
   187→-- Tracks all stage changes for conversion/velocity analysis
   188→-- ============================================
   189→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_stage_history (
   190→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   191→
   192→  -- Object reference
   193→  object_type TEXT NOT NULL, -- 'opportunity', 'partner', 'affiliate'
   194→  object_id UUID NOT NULL,
   195→
   196→  -- Stage change
   197→  from_stage TEXT,
   198→  to_stage TEXT NOT NULL,
   199→
   200→  -- Who and when
   201→  changed_by UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
   202→  changed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
   203→
   204→  notes TEXT
   205→);
   206→
   207→-- ============================================
   208→-- INDEXES
   209→-- ============================================
   210→
   211→-- Opportunities
   212→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_stage ON crm_opportunities(stage);
   213→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_owner ON crm_opportunities(owner_id);
   214→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_source ON crm_opportunities(source);
   215→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_affiliate ON crm_opportunities(affiliate_id);
   216→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_created ON crm_opportunities(created_at);
   217→
   218→-- Partners
   219→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_partners_status ON crm_partners(status);
   220→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_partners_category ON crm_partners(category);
   221→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_partners_owner ON crm_partners(owner_id);
   222→
   223→-- Affiliates
   224→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_affiliates_status ON crm_affiliates(status);
   225→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_affiliates_category ON crm_affiliates(category);
   226→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_affiliates_owner ON crm_affiliates(owner_id);
   227→
   228→-- Contacts
   229→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contacts_owner ON crm_contacts(owner_id);
   230→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contacts_email ON crm_contacts(email);
   231→
   232→-- Contact links
   233→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contact_links_contact ON crm_contact_links(contact_id);
   234→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contact_links_opportunity ON crm_contact_links(opportunity_id);
   235→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contact_links_partner ON crm_contact_links(partner_id);
   236→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contact_links_affiliate ON crm_contact_links(affiliate_id);
   237→
   238→-- Stage history
   239→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_stage_history_object ON crm_stage_history(object_type, object_id);
   240→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_stage_history_changed ON crm_stage_history(changed_at);
   241→
   242→-- ============================================
   243→-- COMMENTS
   244→-- ============================================
   245→
   246→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_opportunities IS 'Unified sales pipeline: Leads (new/contacted/qualified) → Deals (proposal/contract/closed). Single entity journey.';
   247→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_partners IS 'BD relationships. Categories: service_provider, investor_vc, project, individual. Can also be affiliates.';
   248→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_affiliates IS 'KOLs and referrers with commission/rev-share. Lifecycle: new → active → inactive.';
   249→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_contacts IS 'Individual people who can be linked to multiple CRM objects.';
   250→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_contact_links IS 'Links contacts to opportunities, partners, or affiliates with role info.';
   251→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_stage_history IS 'Audit trail of all stage changes for analytics (conversion rates, velocity).';
   252→
```
</details></tool-use>

   866→  const renderTaskRow = (task: Task) => {
   867→    const globalIdx = globalSorted.findIndex(t => t.id === task.id);
   868→
   869→    return (
   870→      <tr key={task.id} className="border-b border-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-50/50 transition-colors group">
   871→        {/* Reorder arrows - always first */}
   872→        <td className={`py-3 px-3 ${COL.reorder}`}>
   873→          <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-0.5">
   874→            <Button
   875→              variant="ghost"
   876→              size="sm"
   877→              className="w-auto h-auto px-1 py-0 hover:bg-gray-100 disabled:opacity-20"
   878→              onClick={() => handleReorder(task.id, 'up')}
   879→              disabled={globalIdx === 0}
   880→            >
   881→              <ChevronUp className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-400" />
   882→            </Button>
   883→            <Button
   884→              variant="ghost"
   885→              size="sm"
   886→              className="w-auto h-auto px-1 py-0 hover:bg-gray-100 disabled:opacity-20"
   887→              onClick={() => handleReorder(task.id, 'down')}
   888→              disabled={globalIdx === globalSorted.length - 1}
   889→            >
   890→              <ChevronDown className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-400" />
   891→            </Button>
   892→          </div>
   893→        </td>
   894→
   895→        {/* Status dropdown */}
   896→        <td className={`py-3 px-1 ${COL.status}`}>
   897→          <Popover>
   898→            <PopoverTrigger asChild>
   899→              {(() => {
   900→                const cfg = STATUS_CONFIG[task.status] || STATUS_CONFIG.to_do;
   901→                const Icon = cfg.icon;
   902→                return (
   903→                  <button className={`p-1 rounded ${cfg.bg} transition-colors`} title={cfg.label}>
   904→                    <Icon className={`h-4 w-4 ${cfg.color}`} />
   905→                  </button>
   906→                );
   907→              })()}
   908→            </PopoverTrigger>
   909→            <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-1" align="start">
   910→              <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
   911→                {STATUSES.map((s) => {
   912→                  const cfg = STATUS_CONFIG[s];
   913→                  const Icon = cfg.icon;
   914→                  return (
   915→                    <button
   916→                      key={s}
   917→                      className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 rounded text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors text-left ${task.status === s ? 'bg-gray-100 font-medium' : ''}`}
   918→                      onClick={() => saveSelectField(task.id, 'status', s)}
   919→                    >
   920→                      <Icon className={`h-4 w-4 ${cfg.color}`} />
   921→                      {cfg.label}
   922→                    </button>
   923→                  );
   924→                })}
   925→              </div>
   926→            </PopoverContent>
   927→          </Popover>
   928→        </td>
   929→
   930→        {/* Dynamic columns based on columnOrder */}
   931→        {columnOrder.map((col) => renderCell(task, col))}
   932→
   933→        {/* Actions - always last */}
   934→        <td className={`py-3 px-3 text-right ${COL.actions}`}>
   935→          <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-0.5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
   936→            <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-7 w-7 p-0 hover:bg-gray-200" onClick={() => openForm(task)} title="Edit in popup">
   937→              <Expand className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-500" />
   938→            </Button>
   939→            <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-7 w-7 p-0 hover:bg-red-50" onClick={() => setDeletingId(task.id)}>
   940→              <Trash2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-red-500" />
   941→            </Button>
   942→          </div>
   943→        </td>
   944→      </tr>
   945→    );
   946→  };
   947→
   948→  const renderTaskTable = (groupTasks: Task[], groupKey: string) => {
   949→    const sorted = [...groupTasks].sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order);
   950→    return (
   951→      <table className="w-full text-sm table-fixed">
   952→        {tableHeader}
   953→        <tbody>
   954→          {sorted.map((task) => renderTaskRow(task))}
   955→          {addingToGroup === groupKey && (
   956→            <tr className="border-b border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/30">
   957→              <td className={`py-3 px-3 ${COL.reorder}`}></td>
   958→              <td className={`py-3 px-3 ${COL.taskName}`} colSpan={9}>
   959→                <Input
   960→                  value={newRowName}
   961→                  onChange={(e) => setNewRowName(e.target.value)}
   962→                  onBlur={handleSaveNewRow}
   963→                  onKeyDown={(e) => {
   964→                    if (e.key === 'Enter') handleSaveNewRow();
   965→                    if (e.key === 'Escape') { setAddingToGroup(null); setNewRowName(''); }
   966→                  }}
   967→                  placeholder="Enter task name..."
   968→                  className="w-full border-none shadow-none p-0 h-auto bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 text-sm font-medium"
   969→                  style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   970→                  autoFocus
   971→                />
   972→              </td>
   973→            </tr>
   974→          )}
   975→        </tbody>
   976→      </table>
   977→    );
   978→  };
   979→
   980→  return (
   981→    <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] w-full bg-gray-50">
   982→      <div className="w-full">
   983→        <div className="space-y-4">
   984→          {/* Header */}
   985→          <div className="w-full bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm p-6">
   986→            <div className="pb-5 border-b border-gray-100 flex flex-row items-center justify-between">
   987→              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   988→                <div className="bg-gray-100 p-2 rounded-lg">
   989→                  <ListTodo className="h-6 w-6 text-gray-600" />
   990→                </div>
   991→                <div>
   992→                  <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Tasks</h2>
   993→                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Manage team tasks, SOPs, and recurring work</p>
   994→                </div>
   995→              </div>
   996→              <Button
   997→                className="hover:opacity-90"
   998→                style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   999→                onClick={() => openForm()}
  1000→              >
  1001→                <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
  1002→                Add Task
  1003→              </Button>
  1004→            </div>
  1005→
  1006→            {/* Tabs */}
  1007→            <div className="pt-4">
  1008→              {loading ? (
  1009→                <div className="flex gap-2">
  1010→                  {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-9 w-28 rounded" />)}
  1011→                </div>
  1012→              ) : (
  1013→                <Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={setActiveTab}>
  1014→                  <TabsList className="bg-gray-100 p-1 h-auto flex-wrap">
  1015→                    <TabsTrigger
  1016→                      value="one-time"
  1017→                      className="data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#3e8692] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm text-sm px-4 py-2"
  1018→                    >
  1019→                      One-Time
  1020→                      <span className="ml-2 text-xs bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">{oneTimeCount}</span>
  1021→                    </TabsTrigger>
  1022→                    <TabsTrigger
  1023→                      value="recurring"
  1024→                      className="data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#3e8692] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm text-sm px-4 py-2"
  1025→                    >
  1026→                      Recurring
  1027→                      <span className="ml-2 text-xs bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">{recurringCount}</span>
  1028→                    </TabsTrigger>
  1029→                    <TabsTrigger
  1030→                      value="client-sop"
  1031→                      className="data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#3e8692] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm text-sm px-4 py-2"
  1032→                    >
  1033→                      Client SOP
  1034→                      <span className="ml-2 text-xs bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">{clientSopCount}</span>
  1035→                    </TabsTrigger>
  1036→                  </TabsList>
  1037→                </Tabs>
  1038→              )}
  1039→            </div>
  1040→
  1041→            {/* Search */}
  1042→            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 pt-4">
  1043→              <div className="relative flex-1 max-w-sm">
  1044→                <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  1045→                <Input
  1046→                  placeholder="Search tasks, assignees, comments..."
  1047→                  className="pl-10 auth-input"
  1048→                  value={searchTerm}
  1049→                  onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
  1050→                />
  1051→              </div>
  1052→              {searchTerm && (
  1053→                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => setSearchTerm('')}>
  1054→                  Clear
  1055→                </Button>
  1056→              )}
  1057→            </div>
  1058→          </div>
  1059→
  1060→          {/* Grouped Tables */}
  1061→          {loading ? (
  1062→            <div className="p-6 space-y-3">
  1063→              {[1, 2, 3, 4].map((i) => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-12 w-full rounded" />)}
  1064→            </div>
  1065→          ) : filtered.length === 0 ? (
  1066→            <div className="w-full bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm">
  1067→              <div className="text-center py-16">
  1068→                <ClipboardList className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-300 mx-auto mb-3" />
  1069→                <p className="text-gray-500 font-medium">
  1070→                  {tasks.length === 0 ? 'No tasks yet.' : 'No tasks match your filters.'}
  1071→                </p>
  1072→                {tasks.length === 0 && (
  1073→                  <Button
  1074→                    className="mt-4 hover:opacity-90"
  1075→                    style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
  1076→                    onClick={() => openForm()}
  1077→                  >
  1078→                    <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Create Your First Task
  1079→                  </Button>
  1080→                )}
  1081→              </div>
  1082→            </div>
  1083→          ) : (
  1084→            <div className="space-y-4">
  1085→              {groupedByUser.map((group, groupIdx) => {
  1086→                const isCollapsed = collapsedUsers.has(group.key);
  1087→                const colors = group.key === '_unassigned'
  1088→                  ? { bg: 'bg-slate-50', text: 'text-slate-600', border: 'border-slate-200' }
  1089→                  : getColorForIndex(groupIdx);
  1090→                const photoUrl = group.key !== '_unassigned' ? userPhotoMap[group.key] : null;
  1091→
  1092→                return (
  1093→                  <div key={group.key}>
  1094→                    {/* Group Header */}
  1095→                    <div
  1096→                      className={`flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 ${colors.bg} ${isCollapsed ? 'rounded-lg' : 'rounded-t-lg'} border ${colors.border} ${isCollapsed ? '' : 'border-b-0'} cursor-pointer select-none transition-all`}
  1097→                      onClick={() => toggleUserCollapse(group.key)}
  1098→                    >
  1099→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
-- Migration: Change payments.content_id to support multiple content IDs
-- This migration converts the content_id column from a single UUID to an array of UUIDs

-- Step 1: Add a new temporary column to store the array of content IDs
ALTER TABLE payments
ADD COLUMN content_ids uuid[];

-- Step 2: Migrate existing data from content_id to content_ids
-- Convert existing single content_id values to single-item arrays
UPDATE payments
SET content_ids = ARRAY[content_id]
WHERE content_id IS NOT NULL;

-- Step 3: Drop the old content_id column
ALTER TABLE payments
DROP COLUMN content_id;

-- Step 4: Rename content_ids to content_id
ALTER TABLE payments
RENAME COLUMN content_ids TO content_id;

-- Step 5: Add comment to the column
COMMENT ON COLUMN payments.content_id IS 'Array of content IDs linked to this payment';

-- Optional: Create an index on the array column for better query performance
CREATE INDEX idx_payments_content_id_gin ON payments USING GIN (content_id);

-- Note: If you have any foreign key constraints on content_id, you'll need to handle those separately
-- You may also need to update any RLS (Row Level Security) policies that reference content_id
```
</details></tool-use>

    71→    blockers: '',

    81→      );
    82→    });

    98→  const hasSubmittedToday = useMemo(() => {
    99→    return standups.some(s => s.user_id === user?.id && s.submission_date === todayStr);
   100→  }, [standups, user?.id, todayStr]);
