 `./components/Sidebar.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client';
     2→
     3→import React, { useState } from 'react';
     4→import Link from 'next/link';
     5→import { usePathname, useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
     6→import Image from 'next/image';
     7→import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
     8→import { Users, Megaphone, Crown, List, Building2, PanelLeftClose, PanelLeftOpen, Settings, LogOut, Shield, MessageSquare, Zap, User, FileText, ClipboardList, Sliders, DollarSign, TrendingUp, Handshake, UserPlus, Archive, Sparkles, Link2, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, BookOpen, CheckCircle, Briefcase, ListTodo, Target, Inbox, Calendar } from 'lucide-react';
     9→import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
    10→import { useChangelog } from '@/contexts/ChangelogContext';
    11→import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuTrigger, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuSeparator } from '@/components/ui/dropdown-menu';
    12→import { Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback } from '@/components/ui/avatar';
    13→import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
    14→import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
    15→import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';
    16→
    17→interface SidebarProps {
    18→  children: React.ReactNode;
    19→}
    20→
    21→export default function Sidebar({ children }: SidebarProps) {
    22→  const pathname = usePathname();
    23→  const router = useRouter();
    24→  const { userProfile, signOut } = useAuth();
    25→  const [isSidebarCollapsed, setIsSidebarCollapsed] = React.useState(() => {
    26→    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
    27→      const stored = localStorage.getItem('sidebarCollapsed');
    28→      return stored === 'true';
    29→    }
    30→    return false;
    31→  });
    32→  const [isChangelogOpen, setIsChangelogOpen] = useState(false);
    33→  const [changelogPage, setChangelogPage] = useState(0);
    34→  const changelogsPerPage = 3;
    35→
    36→  // Get changelog data from context (fetched once at app level)
    37→  const { changelogs, latestVersion } = useChangelog();
    38→
    39→  // Format date for changelog display
    40→  const formatChangelogDate = (dateString: string | null) => {
    41→    if (!dateString) return '';
    42→    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
    43→      year: 'numeric',
    44→      month: 'long',
    45→      day: 'numeric'
    46→    });
    47→  };
    48→
    49→  // Render changelog content
    50→  const renderChangelogContent = (content: string) => {
    51→    return content.split('\n').map((line, index) => {
    52→      if (line.trim().startsWith('- ') || line.trim().startsWith('* ')) {
    53→        return (
    54→          <li key={index} className="ml-4 text-gray-700 text-sm">
    55→            {line.trim().substring(2)}
    56→          </li>
    57→        );
    58→      }
    59→      if (line.trim().startsWith('### ')) {
    60→        return (
    61→          <h4 key={index} className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mt-3 mb-1 text-sm">
    62→            {line.trim().substring(4)}
    63→          </h4>
    64→        );
    65→      }
    66→      if (line.trim().startsWith('## ')) {
    67→        return (
    68→          <h3 key={index} className="font-bold text-gray-900 mt-4 mb-2 text-sm">
    69→            {line.trim().substring(3)}
    70→          </h3>
    71→        );
    72→      }
    73→      if (line.trim() === '') {
    74→        return <div key={index} className="h-2" />;
    75→      }
    76→      return (
    77→        <p key={index} className="text-gray-700 text-sm">
    78→          {line}
    79→        </p>
    80→      );
    81→    });
    82→  };
    83→
    84→  const handleSidebarToggle = () => {
    85→    setIsSidebarCollapsed(prev => {
    86→      localStorage.setItem('sidebarCollapsed', String(!prev));
    87→      return !prev;
    88→    });
    89→  };
    90→
    91→  // Helper function to get user initials
    92→  const getUserInitials = () => {
    93→    if (userProfile?.name) {
    94→      return userProfile.name
    95→        .split(' ')
    96→        .map(word => word.charAt(0).toUpperCase())
    97→        .join('')
    98→        .slice(0, 2);
    99→    }
   100→    return userProfile?.email?.charAt(0).toUpperCase() || 'U';
   101→  };
   102→
   103→  return (
   104→    <div className="h-screen bg-gray-50 flex flex-col">
   105→      {/* Header */}
   106→      <header className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-2 flex-shrink-0">
   107→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   108→          <div className="flex items-center space-x-4">
   109→            <div className="flex items-center">
   110→              <Image src="/images/logo.png" alt="Logo" width={36} height={36} />
   111→              <span className="ml-2 text-xl font-semibold text-gray-800">Holo Hive</span>
   112→              {latestVersion && (
   113→                <Badge
   114→                  variant="secondary"
   115→                  className="ml-2 cursor-pointer bg-[#3e8692]/10 text-[#3e8692] hover:bg-[#3e8692]/20 transition-colors"
   116→                  onClick={() => setIsChangelogOpen(true)}
   117→                >
   118→                  v{latestVersion}
   119→                </Badge>
   120→              )}
   121→            </div>
   122→          </div>
   123→          <div className="flex items-center space-x-4">
   124→              <DropdownMenu>
   125→              <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
   126→                <Button
   127→                  variant="ghost"
   128→                  className="h-8 w-8 p-0 rounded-full hover:bg-transparent active:bg-transparent focus:bg-transparent focus-visible:ring-0 data-[state=open]:bg-transparent"
   129→                >
   130→                  <Avatar className="h-8 w-8">
   131→                    {userProfile?.profile_photo_url ? (
   132→                      <AvatarImage src={userProfile.profile_photo_url} alt={userProfile?.name || userProfile?.email || 'User'} />
   133→                    ) : null}
   134→                    <AvatarFallback className="bg-gray-200 text-gray-800 text-xs font-semibold">
   135→                      {getUserInitials()}
   136→                    </AvatarFallback>
   137→                  </Avatar>
   138→                </Button>
   139→              </DropdownMenuTrigger>
   140→              <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
   141→                <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => router.push('/settings')}>
   142→                  <Settings className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
   143→                  Settings
   144→                </DropdownMenuItem>
   145→                <DropdownMenuSeparator />
   146→                <DropdownMenuItem onClick={signOut}>
   147→                  <LogOut className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
   148→                  Sign out
   149→                </DropdownMenuItem>
   150→              </DropdownMenuContent>
   151→            </DropdownMenu>
   152→          </div>
   153→        </div>
   154→      </header>
   155→      <div className="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">
   156→        {/* Sidebar */}
   157→        <aside className={`${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'w-16' : 'w-64'} bg-white border-r border-gray-200 flex-shrink-0 transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out`}>
   158→          <div className="flex flex-col h-full">
   159→            {/* Navigation */}
   160→            <nav className="p-4 space-y-4 flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
   161→              {/* Holo GPT - Top of sidebar */}
   162→              <div className="space-y-2">
   163→                <Link href="/chat" legacyBehavior>
   164→                  <Button
   165→                    asChild
   166→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/chat') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   167→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   168→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/chat') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   169→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Holo GPT' : undefined}
   170→                  >
   171→                    <span>
   172→                      <Sparkles className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   173→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Holo GPT'}
   174→                    </span>
   175→                  </Button>
   176→                </Link>
   177→              </div>
   178→
   179→              {/* People Section */}
   180→              {!isSidebarCollapsed && (
   181→                <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
   182→                  <User className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   183→                  <div className="flex-1 h-px bg-gray-200"></div>
   184→                </div>
   185→              )}
   186→              <div className="space-y-2">
   187→                {/* Team tab */}
   188→                <Link href="/team" legacyBehavior>
   189→                  <Button
   190→                    asChild
   191→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/team') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   192→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   193→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/team') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   194→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Team' : undefined}
   195→                  >
   196→                    <span>
   197→                      <Shield className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   198→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Team'}
   199→                    </span>
   200→                  </Button>
   201→                </Link>
   202→                {/* Clients tab */}
   203→                <Link href="/clients" legacyBehavior>

   205→                    asChild

   207→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   208→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/clients') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   209→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Clients' : undefined}
   210→                  >
   211→                    <span>
   212→                      <Users className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />

   215→                  </Button>

   217→              </div>
   218→
   219→              {/* KOLs Section */}
   220→              {!isSidebarCollapsed && (
   221→                <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">

   533→                {userProfile?.role === 'super_admin' && (

   535→                    <Button
   536→                      asChild

   538→                      className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   539→                      style={pathname.startsWith('/admin/changelog') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   540→                      title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Changelog' : undefined}
   541→                    >
   542→                      <span>
   543→                        <Sparkles className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   544→                        {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Changelog'}
   545→                      </span>
   546→                    </Button>
   547→                  </Link>
   548→                )}
   549→                {/* Archive tab */}
   550→                <Link href="/archive" legacyBehavior>
   551→                  <Button
   552→                    asChild
   553→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/archive') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   554→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   555→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/archive') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   556→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Archive' : undefined}
   557→                  >
   558→                    <span>
   559→                      <Archive className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   560→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Archive'}
   561→                    </span>
   562→                  </Button>
   563→                </Link>
   564→              </div>
   565→
   566→            </nav>
   567→            {/* Collapse Button at Bottom */}
   568→            <div className="p-4 border-t border-gray-200">
   569→              <div className="flex justify-center">
   570→                <Button
   571→                  variant="ghost"
   572→                  size="sm"
   573→                  onClick={handleSidebarToggle}
   574→                  className="hover:bg-gray-100 w-auto px-2"
   575→                  title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Expand sidebar' : 'Collapse sidebar'}
   576→                >
   577→                  {isSidebarCollapsed ? (
   578→                    <PanelLeftOpen className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-600" />
   579→                  ) : (
   580→                    <PanelLeftClose className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-600" />
   581→                  )}
   582→                </Button>
   583→              </div>
   584→            </div>
   585→          </div>
   586→        </aside>
   587→        {/* Main Content */}
   588→        <main className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6">{children}</main>
   589→      </div>
   590→
   591→      {/* Changelog History Dialog */}
   592→      <Dialog open={isChangelogOpen} onOpenChange={(open) => {
   593→        setIsChangelogOpen(open);
   594→        if (open) setChangelogPage(0);
   595→      }}>
   596→        <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-lg max-h-[80vh]">
   597→          <DialogHeader>
   598→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   599→              <Sparkles className="h-5 w-5 text-[#3e8692]" />
   600→              <DialogTitle className="text-xl">Changelog</DialogTitle>
   601→            </div>
   602→            <DialogDescription>
   603→              Version history and updates
   604→            </DialogDescription>
   605→          </DialogHeader>
   606→          <ScrollArea className="max-h-[50vh] pr-4">
   607→            <div className="space-y-6">
   608→              {changelogs
   609→                .slice(changelogPage * changelogsPerPage, (changelogPage + 1) * changelogsPerPage)
   610→                .map((changelog, idx) => (
   611→                <div key={changelog.id} className={idx > 0 ? 'border-t pt-6' : ''}>
   612→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
   613→                    <Badge
   614→                      variant="secondary"
   615→                      className="bg-[#3e8692]/10 text-[#3e8692]"
   616→                    >
   617→                      v{changelog.version}
   618→                    </Badge>
   619→                    {changelog.published_at && (
   620→                      <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
   621→                        {formatChangelogDate(changelog.published_at)}
   622→                      </span>
   623→                    )}
   624→                  </div>
   625→                  <h3 className="font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">
   626→                    {changelog.title}
   627→                  </h3>
   628→                  <div className="space-y-1">
   629→                    {renderChangelogContent(changelog.content)}
   630→                  </div>
   631→                </div>
   632→              ))}
   633→              {changelogs.length === 0 && (
   634→                <p className="text-gray-500 text-center py-4">
   635→                  No changelogs available yet.
   636→                </p>
   637→              )}
   638→            </div>
   639→          </ScrollArea>
   640→          {changelogs.length > changelogsPerPage && (
   641→            <div className="flex items-center justify-between pt-4 border-t">
   642→              <Button
   643→                variant="outline"
   644→                size="sm"
   645→                onClick={() => setChangelogPage(p => Math.max(0, p - 1))}
   646→                disabled={changelogPage === 0}
   647→              >
   648→                <ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
   649→                Previous
   650→              </Button>
   651→              <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
   652→                Page {changelogPage + 1} of {Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage)}
   653→              </span>
   654→              <Button
   655→                variant="outline"
   656→                size="sm"
   657→                onClick={() => setChangelogPage(p => Math.min(Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage) - 1, p + 1))}
   658→                disabled={changelogPage >= Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage) - 1}
   659→              >
   660→                Next
   661→                <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4 ml-1" />
   662→              </Button>
   663→            </div>
   664→          )}
   665→        </DialogContent>
   666→      </Dialog>
   667→    </div>
   668→  );
   669→}
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→-- CRM Database Schema
     2→-- Core Tables: Opportunities (Leads+Deals), Partners, Affiliates, Contacts
     3→-- Supporting: Stage History for analytics
     4→
     5→-- ============================================
     6→-- 1. AFFILIATES TABLE (created first for FK reference)
     7→-- KOLs, referrers with rev-share or commission
     8→-- Lifecycle: New → Active → Inactive
     9→-- ============================================
    10→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_affiliates (
    11→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    12→
    13→  -- Basic Info
    14→  name TEXT NOT NULL,
    15→  affiliation TEXT, -- Their affiliation/company
    16→  category TEXT, -- Type of affiliate
    17→
    18→  -- Lifecycle
    19→  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new', -- 'new', 'active', 'inactive'
    20→
    21→  -- Commission
    22→  commission_model TEXT, -- Description of commission/rev-share structure
    23→  commission_rate DECIMAL, -- Percentage if applicable
    24→
    25→  -- Tracking
    26→  last_contacted_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    27→
    28→  -- Ownership
    29→  owner_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
    30→
    31→  -- Point of Contact (inline)
    32→  poc_name TEXT,
    33→  poc_email TEXT,
    34→  poc_telegram TEXT,
    35→
    36→  -- Notes
    37→  notes TEXT,
    38→
    39→  -- Timestamps
    40→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    41→  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
    42→);
    43→
    44→-- ============================================
    45→-- 2. OPPORTUNITIES TABLE (Unified Leads + Deals)
    46→-- Single pipeline: New → Contacted → Qualified → Proposal → Contract → Closed
    47→-- ============================================
    48→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_opportunities (
    49→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    50→
    51→  -- Basic Info
    52→  name TEXT NOT NULL,
    53→
    54→  -- Pipeline Stage (unified lead + deal stages)
    55→  stage TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new',
    56→  -- Lead stages: 'new', 'contacted', 'qualified', 'unqualified', 'nurture'
    57→  -- Deal stages: 'proposal', 'contract', 'closed_won', 'closed_lost'
    58→
    59→  -- Classification
    60→  account_type TEXT, -- 'general', 'channel', 'campaign', 'lite', 'ad_hoc' (set when qualified)
    61→
    62→  -- Value (set when becomes a deal)
    63→  deal_value DECIMAL,
    64→  currency TEXT DEFAULT 'USD',
    65→
    66→  -- Tracking
    67→  last_contacted_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    68→
    69→  -- Ownership & Source
    70→  owner_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
    71→  source TEXT, -- 'referral', 'inbound', 'event', 'cold_outreach'
    72→  referrer TEXT, -- Who referred them
    73→
    74→  -- Communication
    75→  gc TEXT, -- Group Chat link/info
    76→
    77→  -- Affiliate connection (for commission tracking)
    78→  affiliate_id UUID REFERENCES crm_affiliates(id),
    79→
    80→  -- Notes
    81→  notes TEXT,
    82→
    83→  -- Timestamps
    84→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    85→  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    86→  qualified_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, -- When moved from lead to deal stage
    87→  closed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE -- When won or lost
    88→);
    89→
    90→-- ============================================
    91→-- 3. PARTNERS TABLE
    92→-- BD relationships, cross-partnerships
    93→-- Lifecycle: Active / Inactive
    94→-- ============================================
    95→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_partners (
    96→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    97→
    98→  -- Basic Info
    99→  name TEXT NOT NULL,
   100→
   101→  -- Classification
   102→  category TEXT, -- 'service_provider', 'investor_vc', 'project', 'individual'
   103→  focus TEXT, -- Area of focus/expertise
   104→
   105→  -- Lifecycle
   106→  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', -- 'active', 'inactive'
   107→
   108→  -- Tracking
   109→  last_contacted_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
   110→
   111→  -- Ownership
   112→  owner_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
   113→
   114→  -- Point of Contact (inline)
   115→  poc_name TEXT,
   116→  poc_email TEXT,
   117→  poc_telegram TEXT,
   118→
   119→  -- Affiliate connection (if partner is also an affiliate)
   120→  is_affiliate BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
   121→  affiliate_id UUID REFERENCES crm_affiliates(id),
   122→
   123→  -- Notes
   124→  notes TEXT,
   125→
   126→  -- Timestamps
   127→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
   128→  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
   129→);
   130→
   131→-- ============================================
   132→-- 4. CONTACTS TABLE
   133→-- Individual people linked to opportunities/partners/affiliates
   134→-- ============================================
   135→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_contacts (
   136→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   137→
   138→  -- Basic Info
   139→  name TEXT NOT NULL,
   140→  email TEXT,
   141→  telegram_id TEXT,
   142→  x_id TEXT,
   143→  role TEXT, -- Their role/title
   144→  category TEXT, -- Contact category
   145→
   146→  -- Ownership
   147→  owner_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
   148→
   149→  -- Notes
   150→  notes TEXT,
   151→
   152→  -- Timestamps
   153→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
   154→  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
   155→);
   156→
   157→-- ============================================
   158→-- 5. CONTACT LINKS (Junction Table)
   159→-- Links contacts to opportunities/partners/affiliates
   160→-- ============================================
   161→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_contact_links (
   162→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   163→  contact_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES crm_contacts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   164→
   165→  -- Linked object type and ID
   166→  linked_type TEXT NOT NULL, -- 'opportunity', 'partner', 'affiliate'
   167→  opportunity_id UUID REFERENCES crm_opportunities(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   168→  partner_id UUID REFERENCES crm_partners(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   169→  affiliate_id UUID REFERENCES crm_affiliates(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   170→
   171→  -- Role in this relationship
   172→  role TEXT,
   173→  is_primary BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
   174→
   175→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
   176→
   177→  -- Ensure only one link type is set
   178→  CONSTRAINT check_single_link CHECK (
   179→    (CASE WHEN opportunity_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
   180→     CASE WHEN partner_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
   181→     CASE WHEN affiliate_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1
   182→  )
   183→);
   184→
   185→-- ============================================
   186→-- 6. STAGE HISTORY (For Analytics)
   187→-- Tracks all stage changes for conversion/velocity analysis
   188→-- ============================================
   189→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_stage_history (
   190→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   191→
   192→  -- Object reference
   193→  object_type TEXT NOT NULL, -- 'opportunity', 'partner', 'affiliate'
   194→  object_id UUID NOT NULL,
   195→
   196→  -- Stage change
   197→  from_stage TEXT,
   198→  to_stage TEXT NOT NULL,
   199→
   200→  -- Who and when
   201→  changed_by UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
   202→  changed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
   203→
   204→  notes TEXT
   205→);
   206→
   207→-- ============================================
   208→-- INDEXES
   209→-- ============================================
   210→
   211→-- Opportunities
   212→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_stage ON crm_opportunities(stage);
   213→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_owner ON crm_opportunities(owner_id);
   214→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_source ON crm_opportunities(source);
   215→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_affiliate ON crm_opportunities(affiliate_id);
   216→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_created ON crm_opportunities(created_at);
   217→
   218→-- Partners
   219→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_partners_status ON crm_partners(status);
   220→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_partners_category ON crm_partners(category);
   221→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_partners_owner ON crm_partners(owner_id);
   222→
   223→-- Affiliates
   224→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_affiliates_status ON crm_affiliates(status);
   225→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_affiliates_category ON crm_affiliates(category);
   226→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_affiliates_owner ON crm_affiliates(owner_id);
   227→
   228→-- Contacts
   229→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contacts_owner ON crm_contacts(owner_id);
   230→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contacts_email ON crm_contacts(email);
   231→
   232→-- Contact links
   233→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contact_links_contact ON crm_contact_links(contact_id);
   234→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contact_links_opportunity ON crm_contact_links(opportunity_id);
   235→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contact_links_partner ON crm_contact_links(partner_id);
   236→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contact_links_affiliate ON crm_contact_links(affiliate_id);
   237→
   238→-- Stage history
   239→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_stage_history_object ON crm_stage_history(object_type, object_id);
   240→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_stage_history_changed ON crm_stage_history(changed_at);
   241→
   242→-- ============================================
   243→-- COMMENTS
   244→-- ============================================
   245→
   246→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_opportunities IS 'Unified sales pipeline: Leads (new/contacted/qualified) → Deals (proposal/contract/closed). Single entity journey.';
   247→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_partners IS 'BD relationships. Categories: service_provider, investor_vc, project, individual. Can also be affiliates.';
   248→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_affiliates IS 'KOLs and referrers with commission/rev-share. Lifecycle: new → active → inactive.';
   249→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_contacts IS 'Individual people who can be linked to multiple CRM objects.';
   250→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_contact_links IS 'Links contacts to opportunities, partners, or affiliates with role info.';
   251→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_stage_history IS 'Audit trail of all stage changes for analytics (conversion rates, velocity).';
   252→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./lib/telegramService.ts`

```text
     1→/**
     2→ * Telegram Bot Service
     3→ * Sends notifications to Telegram chat rooms
     4→ */
     5→
     6→interface TelegramMessage {
     7→  chat_id: string;
     8→  text: string;
     9→  parse_mode?: 'HTML' | 'Markdown' | 'MarkdownV2';
    10→  disable_web_page_preview?: boolean;
    11→  message_thread_id?: number;
    12→}
    13→
    14→export class TelegramService {
    15→  // Read env vars at runtime via getters to avoid serverless caching issues
    16→  private static get botToken() {
    17→    return process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;
    18→  }
    19→
    20→  private static get chatId() {
    21→    return process.env.TELEGRAM_TERMINAL_CHAT_ID;
    22→  }
    23→
    24→  private static get threadId() {
    25→    return process.env.TELEGRAM_TERMINAL_THREAD_ID;
    26→  }
    27→
    28→  /**
    29→   * Send a message to the configured Telegram chat
    30→   */
    31→  static async sendMessage(text: string, parseMode: 'HTML' | 'Markdown' = 'HTML'): Promise<boolean> {
    32→    const botToken = this.botToken;
    33→    const chatId = this.chatId;
    34→    const threadId = this.threadId;
    35→
    36→    if (!botToken || !chatId) {
    37→      console.error('[Telegram] Configuration missing:', {
    38→        hasToken: !!botToken,
    39→        hasChatId: !!chatId,
    40→        tokenPrefix: botToken ? botToken.substring(0, 10) + '...' : 'missing',
    41→        chatId: chatId || 'missing'
    42→      });
    43→      return false;
    44→    }
    45→
    46→    try {
    47→      const message: TelegramMessage = {
    48→        chat_id: chatId,
    49→        text,
    50→        parse_mode: parseMode,
    51→        disable_web_page_preview: false,
    52→      };
    53→
    54→      // Add thread ID if configured (for sending to specific topics in groups)
    55→      if (threadId) {
    56→        message.message_thread_id = parseInt(threadId);
    57→      }
    58→
    59→      console.log('[Telegram] Sending message:', {
    60→        chatId: chatId,
    61→        threadId: threadId,
    62→        messageLength: text.length,
    63→        parseMode
    64→      });
    65→
    66→      const response = await fetch(
    67→        `https://api.telegram.org/bot${botToken}/sendMessage`,
    68→        {
    69→          method: 'POST',
    70→          headers: {
    71→            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    72→          },
    73→          body: JSON.stringify(message),
    74→        }
    75→      );
    76→
    77→      if (!response.ok) {
    78→        const error = await response.json();
    79→        console.error('[Telegram] API error:', {
    80→          status: response.status,
    81→          error
    82→        });
    83→        return false;
    84→      }
    85→
    86→      const result = await response.json();
    87→      console.log('[Telegram] Message sent successfully:', {
    88→        messageId: result.result?.message_id,
    89→        chatId: result.result?.chat?.id
    90→      });
    91→
    92→      return true;
    93→    } catch (error) {
    94→      console.error('[Telegram] Error sending message:', error);
    95→      return false;
    96→    }
    97→  }
    98→
    99→  /**
   100→   * Format and send form submission notification
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./sql/migrations/018_create_form_attachments_storage.sql`

```text
     1→-- Create storage bucket for form attachments
     2→-- This allows public form submissions to upload files
     3→
     4→-- Create the storage bucket
     5→INSERT INTO storage.buckets (id, name, public, file_size_limit, allowed_mime_types)
     6→VALUES (
     7→  'form-attachments',
     8→  'form-attachments',
     9→  true, -- Public bucket so anyone can read the files
    10→  10485760, -- 10MB file size limit
    11→  ARRAY[
    12→    'image/jpeg',
    13→    'image/png',
    14→    'image/gif',
    15→    'image/webp',
    16→    'application/pdf',
    17→    'application/msword',
    18→    'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
    19→    'application/vnd.ms-excel',
    20→    'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet',
    21→    'text/plain',
    22→    'text/csv'
    23→  ]
    24→)
    25→ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;
    26→
    27→-- Create storage policies
    28→
    29→-- Allow anyone to upload files (for public form submissions)
    30→CREATE POLICY "Anyone can upload form attachments"
    31→  ON storage.objects FOR INSERT
    32→  WITH CHECK (
    33→    bucket_id = 'form-attachments'
    34→  );
    35→
    36→-- Allow anyone to read files (public bucket)
    37→CREATE POLICY "Anyone can read form attachments"
    38→  ON storage.objects FOR SELECT
    39→  USING (
    40→    bucket_id = 'form-attachments'
    41→  );
    42→
    43→-- Allow form owners and admins to delete attachments
    44→CREATE POLICY "Form owners and admins can delete attachments"
    45→  ON storage.objects FOR DELETE
    46→  USING (
    47→    bucket_id = 'form-attachments'
    48→    AND (
    49→      -- Check if user owns the form (path format: formId/fieldId/filename)
    50→      EXISTS (
    51→        SELECT 1 FROM forms
    52→        WHERE forms.id::text = split_part(name, '/', 1)
    53→        AND forms.user_id = auth.uid()
    54→      )
    55→      OR
    56→      -- Check if user is admin
    57→      EXISTS (
    58→        SELECT 1 FROM users
    59→        WHERE users.id = auth.uid()
    60→        AND users.role = 'admin'
    61→      )
    62→    )
    63→  );
    64→
    65→-- Add comment for documentation
    66→COMMENT ON POLICY "Anyone can upload form attachments" ON storage.objects IS
    67→  'Allows anyone (including anonymous users) to upload attachments when submitting forms';
    68→
    69→COMMENT ON POLICY "Anyone can read form attachments" ON storage.objects IS
    70→  'Allows public access to read form attachments since the bucket is public';
    71→
    72→COMMENT ON POLICY "Form owners and admins can delete attachments" ON storage.objects IS
    73→  'Allows form owners to delete attachments for their forms, and admins to delete any attachment';
    74→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { supabase } from './supabase';
     2→import { Database } from './database.types';
     3→import { generateUniqueSlug } from './slugUtils';
     4→
     5→type Client = Database['public']['Tables']['clients']['Row'];
     6→type ClientAccessMember = Database['public']['Tables']['client_access_members']['Row'];
     7→
     8→export interface ClientWithAccess extends Client {
     9→  member_count?: number;
    10→  campaign_count?: number;
    11→  whitelist_partner_name?: string;
    12→}
    13→
    14→export class ClientService {
    15→  /**
    16→   * Get clients based on user role
    17→   * - Admins: See all clients
    18→   * - Members: See only clients they have access to via client_access_members
    19→   */
    20→  static async getClientsForUser(userRole: 'super_admin' | 'admin' | 'member' | 'client', userId: string): Promise<ClientWithAccess[]> {
    21→    try {
    22→      if (userRole === 'admin' || userRole === 'super_admin') {
    23→        // Admins and super admins can see all non-archived clients
    24→        const { data: clients, error } = await supabase
    25→          .from('clients')
    26→          .select(`
    27→            *,
    28→            client_access_members(count),
    29→            campaigns!campaigns_client_id_fkey(count),
    30→            whitelist_partner:partners!clients_whitelist_partner_id_fkey(name)
    31→          `)
    32→          .is('archived_at', null)
    33→          .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
    34→
    35→        if (error) throw error;
    36→
    37→        return clients?.map(client => ({
    38→          ...client,
    39→          member_count: client.client_access_members?.[0]?.count || 0,
    40→          campaign_count: (client as any).campaigns?.[0]?.count || 0,
    41→          whitelist_partner_name: (client.whitelist_partner as any)?.name
    42→        })) || [];
    43→      } else {
    44→        // Members can only see non-archived clients they have access to
    45→        const { data: clientAccess, error } = await supabase
    46→          .from('client_access_members')
    47→          .select(`
    48→            clients!inner(
    49→              id,
    50→              name,
    51→              email,
    52→              location,
    53→              is_active,
    54→              archived_at,
    55→              created_at,
    56→              updated_at,
    57→              logo_url,
    58→              campaigns!campaigns_client_id_fkey(count),
    59→              whitelist_partner:partners!clients_whitelist_partner_id_fkey(name)
    60→            )
    61→          `)
    62→          .eq('user_id', userId);
    63→
    64→        if (error) throw error;
    65→
    66→        return clientAccess?.map(access => {
    67→          const client = (access as any).clients;
    68→          return {
    69→            ...client,
    70→            campaign_count: client.campaigns?.[0]?.count || 0,
    71→            whitelist_partner_name: (client.whitelist_partner as any)?.name
    72→          };
    73→        }).filter(c => c && !c.archived_at) || [];
    74→      }
    75→    } catch (error) {
    76→      console.error('Error fetching clients:', error);
    77→      throw error;
    78→    }
    79→  }
    80→
    81→  /**
    82→   * Get all non-archived clients (admin only)
    83→   */
    84→  static async getAllClients(): Promise<Client[]> {
    85→    try {
    86→      const { data, error } = await supabase
    87→        .from('clients')
    88→        .select('*')
    89→        .is('archived_at', null)
    90→        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
    91→
    92→      if (error) throw error;
    93→      return data || [];
    94→    } catch (error) {
    95→      console.error('Error fetching all clients:', error);
    96→      throw error;
    97→    }
    98→  }
    99→
   100→  /**
```

```text
   104→const frequencyBadge = (freq: string) => {
   105→  switch (freq) {
   106→    case 'one-time': return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
   107→    case 'daily': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800';
   108→    case 'weekly': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800';
   109→    case 'monthly': return 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800';
   110→    case 'recurring': return 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-800';
   111→    default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
   112→  }
   113→};
   114→
   115→const typeBadge = (type: string) => {
   116→  switch (type) {
   117→    case 'Admin & Operations': return 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-700';
   118→    case 'Finance & Invoicing': return 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800';
   119→    case 'General': return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
   120→    case 'Tech & Tools': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800';
   121→    case 'Marketing & Sales': return 'bg-pink-100 text-pink-800';
   122→    case 'Client SOP': return 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-800';
   123→    case 'Client Delivery': return 'bg-cyan-100 text-cyan-800';
   124→    case 'Performance Review': return 'bg-violet-100 text-violet-800';
   125→    case 'Research & Analytics': return 'bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-800';
   126→    default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
   127→  }
   128→};
   129→
   130→const getDueDateColor = (dueDate: string | null) => {
   131→  if (!dueDate) return '';
   132→  const today = new Date();
   133→  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
   134→  const due = new Date(dueDate + 'T00:00:00');
   135→  const diffDays = Math.ceil((due.getTime() - today.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   136→  if (diffDays < 0) return 'text-red-600 font-semibold';
   137→  if (diffDays <= 3) return 'text-amber-600 font-semibold';
   138→  return 'text-gray-600';
   139→};
   140→
   141→/** Format a Date to YYYY-MM-DD in local timezone (avoids UTC offset issues) */
   142→const toLocalDateString = (date: Date) => {
   143→  const year = date.getFullYear();
   144→  const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
   145→  const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
   146→  return `${year}-${month}-${day}`;
   147→};

   199→      if (saved) {
   200→        const parsed = JSON.parse(saved) as ColumnKey[];
```

```text
     1→'use client';
     2→
     3→import { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
     4→import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
     5→import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
     6→import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
     7→import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
     8→import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
     9→import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
    10→import { Skeleton } from '@/components/ui/skeleton';
    11→import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs';
    12→import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
    13→import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase';
    14→import { UserService } from '@/lib/userService';
    15→import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';
    16→import Image from 'next/image';
    17→import {
    18→  Plus,
    19→  CheckCircle,
    20→  Search,
    21→  Trash2,
    22→  Edit,
    23→  Calendar as CalendarIcon,
    24→  ClipboardList,
    25→  X,
    26→  Check,
    27→  XCircle,
    28→  ExternalLink,
    29→} from 'lucide-react';
    30→
    31→type DailyStandup = {
    32→  id: string;
    33→  user_id: string;
    34→  user_name: string;
    35→  completed_yesterday: 'Yes' | 'No';
    36→  priorities: string;
    37→  output_goal: string;
    38→  blockers: string | null;
    39→  submitted_at: string;
    40→  submission_date: string;
    41→  created_at: string;
    42→};
    43→
    44→type TeamMember = {
    45→  id: string;
    46→  name: string;
    47→  email: string;
    48→  role: string;
    49→  profile_photo_url: string | null;
    50→};
    51→
    52→export default function DailyStandupPage() {
    53→  const { user, userProfile } = useAuth();
    54→  const { toast } = useToast();
    55→
    56→  const [standups, setStandups] = useState<DailyStandup[]>([]);
    57→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    58→  const [teamMembers, setTeamMembers] = useState<TeamMember[]>([]);
    59→  const [selectedUserId, setSelectedUserId] = useState<string>('all');
    60→  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
    61→
    62→  // Form state
    63→  const [isFormOpen, setIsFormOpen] = useState(false);
    64→  const [editingId, setEditingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
    65→  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
    66→  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);
    67→  const [form, setForm] = useState({
    68→    completed_yesterday: '' as string,
    69→    priorities: '',
    70→    output_goal: '',
    71→    blockers: '',
    72→  });
    73→
    74→  useEffect(() => {
    75→    fetchStandups();
    76→    UserService.getAllUsers().then((users) => {
    77→      setTeamMembers(
    78→        users
    79→          .filter(u => u.role !== 'client')
    80→          .map(u => ({ id: u.id, name: u.name || u.email, email: u.email, role: u.role, profile_photo_url: u.profile_photo_url || null }))
    81→      );
    82→    });
    83→  }, []);
    84→
    85→  const fetchStandups = async () => {
    86→    setLoading(true);
    87→    const { data } = await supabase
    88→      .from('daily_standups')
    89→      .select('*')
    90→      .order('submission_date', { ascending: false })
    91→      .order('submitted_at', { ascending: false });
    92→    setStandups(data || []);
    93→    setLoading(false);
    94→  };
    95→
    96→  // Check if user already submitted today
    97→  const todayStr = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
    98→  const hasSubmittedToday = useMemo(() => {
    99→    return standups.some(s => s.user_id === user?.id && s.submission_date === todayStr);
   100→  }, [standups, user?.id, todayStr]);
   101→
   102→  // Filter standups
   103→  const filtered = useMemo(() => {
   104→    return standups.filter(s => {
   105→      const matchesUser = selectedUserId === 'all' || s.user_id === selectedUserId;
   106→      const matchesSearch = !searchTerm ||
   107→        s.priorities.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
   108→        s.output_goal.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
   109→        (s.blockers && s.blockers.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase())) ||
   110→        s.user_name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase());
   111→      return matchesUser && matchesSearch;
   112→    });
   113→  }, [standups, selectedUserId, searchTerm]);
   114→
   115→  // Group by date
   116→  const groupedByDate = useMemo(() => {
   117→    const groups: Record<string, DailyStandup[]> = {};
   118→    for (const s of filtered) {
   119→      if (!groups[s.submission_date]) groups[s.submission_date] = [];
   120→      groups[s.submission_date].push(s);
   121→    }
   122→    return Object.entries(groups).sort(([a], [b]) => b.localeCompare(a));
   123→  }, [filtered]);
   124→
   125→  // Get team members who have submitted at least one standup
   126→  const activeMembers = useMemo(() => {
   127→    const userIds = new Set(standups.map(s => s.user_id));
   128→    return teamMembers.filter(m => userIds.has(m.id));
   129→  }, [standups, teamMembers]);
   130→
   131→  // Map user_id to profile photo
   132→  const userPhotoMap = useMemo(() => {
   133→    const map: Record<string, string | null> = {};
   134→    teamMembers.forEach(m => { map[m.id] = m.profile_photo_url; });
   135→    return map;
   136→  }, [teamMembers]);
   137→
   138→  const openForm = (standup?: DailyStandup) => {
   139→    if (standup) {
   140→      setEditingId(standup.id);
   141→      setForm({
```

```text
   340→      if (b === '_unassigned') return -1;

   342→      const nameB = map.get(b)![0].assigned_to_name || '';
   343→      return nameA.localeCompare(nameB);
   344→    });
   345→
```

 `./supabase_migration_multiple_contents.sql`

```text
     1→-- Migration: Change payments.content_id to support multiple content IDs
     2→-- This migration converts the content_id column from a single UUID to an array of UUIDs
     3→
     4→-- Step 1: Add a new temporary column to store the array of content IDs
     5→ALTER TABLE payments
     6→ADD COLUMN content_ids uuid[];
     7→
     8→-- Step 2: Migrate existing data from content_id to content_ids
     9→-- Convert existing single content_id values to single-item arrays
    10→UPDATE payments
    11→SET content_ids = ARRAY[content_id]
    12→WHERE content_id IS NOT NULL;
    13→
    14→-- Step 3: Drop the old content_id column
    15→ALTER TABLE payments
    16→DROP COLUMN content_id;
    17→
    18→-- Step 4: Rename content_ids to content_id
    19→ALTER TABLE payments
    20→RENAME COLUMN content_ids TO content_id;
    21→
    22→-- Step 5: Add comment to the column
    23→COMMENT ON COLUMN payments.content_id IS 'Array of content IDs linked to this payment';
    24→
    25→-- Optional: Create an index on the array column for better query performance
    26→CREATE INDEX idx_payments_content_id_gin ON payments USING GIN (content_id);
    27→
    28→-- Note: If you have any foreign key constraints on content_id, you'll need to handle those separately
    29→-- You may also need to update any RLS (Row Level Security) policies that reference content_id
    30→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./hooks/use-toast.ts`

```text
     1→'use client';
     2→
     3→// Inspired by react-hot-toast library
     4→import * as React from 'react';
     5→
     6→import type { ToastActionElement, ToastProps } from '@/components/ui/toast';
     7→
     8→const TOAST_LIMIT = 1;
     9→const TOAST_REMOVE_DELAY = 1000000;
    10→
    11→type ToasterToast = ToastProps & {
    12→  id: string;
    13→  title?: React.ReactNode;
    14→  description?: React.ReactNode;
    15→  action?: ToastActionElement;
    16→};
    17→
    18→const actionTypes = {
    19→  ADD_TOAST: 'ADD_TOAST',
    20→  UPDATE_TOAST: 'UPDATE_TOAST',
    21→  DISMISS_TOAST: 'DISMISS_TOAST',
    22→  REMOVE_TOAST: 'REMOVE_TOAST',
    23→} as const;
    24→
    25→let count = 0;
    26→
    27→function genId() {
    28→  count = (count + 1) % Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER;
    29→  return count.toString();
    30→}
    31→
    32→type ActionType = typeof actionTypes;
    33→
    34→type Action =
    35→  | {
    36→      type: ActionType['ADD_TOAST'];
    37→      toast: ToasterToast;
    38→    }
    39→  | {
    40→      type: ActionType['UPDATE_TOAST'];
    41→      toast: Partial<ToasterToast>;
    42→    }
    43→  | {
    44→      type: ActionType['DISMISS_TOAST'];
    45→      toastId?: ToasterToast['id'];
    46→    }
    47→  | {
    48→      type: ActionType['REMOVE_TOAST'];
    49→      toastId?: ToasterToast['id'];
    50→    };
    51→
    52→interface State {
    53→  toasts: ToasterToast[];
    54→}
    55→
    56→const toastTimeouts = new Map<string, ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>();
    57→
    58→const addToRemoveQueue = (toastId: string) => {
    59→  if (toastTimeouts.has(toastId)) {
    60→    return;
    61→  }
    62→
    63→  const timeout = setTimeout(() => {
    64→    toastTimeouts.delete(toastId);
    65→    dispatch({
    66→      type: 'REMOVE_TOAST',
    67→      toastId: toastId,
    68→    });
    69→  }, TOAST_REMOVE_DELAY);
    70→
    71→  toastTimeouts.set(toastId, timeout);
    72→};
    73→
    74→export const reducer = (state: State, action: Action): State => {
    75→  switch (action.type) {
    76→    case 'ADD_TOAST':
    77→      return {
    78→        ...state,
    79→        toasts: [action.toast, ...state.toasts].slice(0, TOAST_LIMIT),
    80→      };
    81→
    82→    case 'UPDATE_TOAST':
    83→      return {
    84→        ...state,
    85→        toasts: state.toasts.map((t) =>
    86→          t.id === action.toast.id ? { ...t, ...action.toast } : t
    87→        ),
    88→      };
    89→
    90→    case 'DISMISS_TOAST': {
    91→      const { toastId } = action;
    92→
    93→      // ! Side effects ! - This could be extracted into a dismissToast() action,
    94→      // but I'll keep it here for simplicity
    95→      if (toastId) {
    96→        addToRemoveQueue(toastId);
    97→      } else {
    98→        state.toasts.forEach((toast) => {
    99→          addToRemoveQueue(toast.id);
   100→        });
   101→      }
   102→
   103→      return {
   104→        ...state,
   105→        toasts: state.toasts.map((t) =>
   106→          t.id === toastId || toastId === undefined
   107→            ? {
   108→                ...t,
   109→                open: false,
   110→              }
   111→            : t
   112→        ),
   113→      };
   114→    }
   115→    case 'REMOVE_TOAST':
   116→      if (action.toastId === undefined) {
   117→        return {
   118→          ...state,
   119→          toasts: [],
   120→        };
   121→      }
   122→      return {
   123→        ...state,
   124→        toasts: state.toasts.filter((t) => t.id !== action.toastId),
   125→      };
   126→  }
   127→};
   128→
   129→const listeners: Array<(state: State) => void> = [];
   130→
   131→let memoryState: State = { toasts: [] };
   132→
   133→function dispatch(action: Action) {
   134→  memoryState = reducer(memoryState, action);
   135→  listeners.forEach((listener) => {
   136→    listener(memoryState);
   137→  });
   138→}
   139→
   140→type Toast = Omit<ToasterToast, 'id'>;
   141→
   142→function toast({ ...props }: Toast) {
   143→  const id = genId();
   144→
   145→  const update = (props: ToasterToast) =>
   146→    dispatch({
   147→      type: 'UPDATE_TOAST',
   148→      toast: { ...props, id },
   149→    });
   150→  const dismiss = () => dispatch({ type: 'DISMISS_TOAST', toastId: id });
   151→
   152→  dispatch({
   153→    type: 'ADD_TOAST',
   154→    toast: {
   155→      ...props,
   156→      id,
   157→      open: true,
   158→      onOpenChange: (open) => {
   159→        if (!open) dismiss();
   160→      },
   161→    },
   162→  });
   163→
   164→  return {
   165→    id: id,
   166→    dismiss,
   167→    update,
   168→  };
   169→}
   170→
   171→function useToast() {
   172→  const [state, setState] = React.useState<State>(memoryState);
   173→
   174→  React.useEffect(() => {
   175→    listeners.push(setState);
   176→    return () => {
   177→      const index = listeners.indexOf(setState);
   178→      if (index > -1) {
   179→        listeners.splice(index, 1);
   180→      }
   181→    };
   182→  }, [state]);
   183→
   184→  return {
   185→    ...state,
   186→    toast,
   187→    dismiss: (toastId?: string) => dispatch({ type: 'DISMISS_TOAST', toastId }),
   188→  };
   189→}
   190→
   191→export { useToast, toast };
   192→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-03-17 09:32:44Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./sql/001_create_users_table.sql`

```text
     1→-- Create users table
     2→CREATE TABLE users (
     3→  id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id) PRIMARY KEY,
     4→  email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
     5→  name TEXT NOT NULL,
     6→  role TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (role IN ('admin', 'member', 'client')),
     7→  is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
     8→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
     9→  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
    10→);
    11→
    12→-- Create a function to automatically update the updated_at column
    13→CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
    14→RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
    15→BEGIN
    16→  NEW.updated_at = NOW();
    17→  RETURN NEW;
    18→END;
    19→$$ language 'plpgsql';
    20→
    21→-- Create a trigger to automatically update updated_at
    22→CREATE TRIGGER update_users_updated_at 
    23→  BEFORE UPDATE ON users 
    24→  FOR EACH ROW 
    25→  EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();
    26→
    27→-- Enable Row Level Security (RLS)
    28→ALTER TABLE users ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
    29→
    30→-- Create policies for RLS
    31→-- Users can view their own record
    32→CREATE POLICY "Users can view own record" ON users
    33→  FOR SELECT USING (auth.uid() = id);
    34→
    35→-- Users can update their own record (except role and is_active)
    36→CREATE POLICY "Users can update own record" ON users
    37→  FOR UPDATE USING (auth.uid() = id);
    38→
    39→-- Admins can view all records
    40→CREATE POLICY "Admins can view all users" ON users
    41→  FOR SELECT USING (
    42→    EXISTS (
    43→      SELECT 1 FROM users 
    44→      WHERE id = auth.uid() AND role = 'admin'
    45→    )
    46→  );
    47→
    48→-- Admins can update all records
    49→CREATE POLICY "Admins can update all users" ON users
    50→  FOR UPDATE USING (
    51→    EXISTS (
    52→      SELECT 1 FROM users 
    53→      WHERE id = auth.uid() AND role = 'admin'
    54→    )
    55→  );
    56→
    57→-- Enable insert for auth trigger (allows trigger to create user records)
    58→CREATE POLICY "Enable insert for auth trigger" ON users
    59→  FOR INSERT 
    60→  WITH CHECK (auth.uid() = id);
    61→
    62→-- Function to handle new user registration
    63→CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION handle_new_user()
    64→RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
    65→BEGIN
    66→  INSERT INTO public.users (id, email, name, role)
    67→  VALUES (
    68→    NEW.id,
    69→    NEW.email,
    70→    COALESCE(
    71→      NEW.raw_user_meta_data->>'name', 
    72→      CONCAT(
    73→        COALESCE(NEW.raw_user_meta_data->>'first_name', ''), 
    74→        ' ', 
    75→        COALESCE(NEW.raw_user_meta_data->>'last_name', '')
    76→      ),
    77→      'User'
    78→    ),
    79→    COALESCE(NEW.raw_user_meta_data->>'role', 'member')
    80→  );
    81→  RETURN NEW;
    82→END;
    83→$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER;
    84→
    85→-- Trigger to automatically create user record when auth user is created
    86→CREATE TRIGGER on_auth_user_created
    87→  AFTER INSERT ON auth.users
    88→  FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION handle_new_user();
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→"use client";
     2→import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
     3→import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";

    11→import { Calendar } from "@/components/ui/calendar";
    12→import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from "@/components/ui/popover";
    13→import { Search, Plus, Megaphone, Building2, DollarSign, Calendar as CalendarIcon, Trash2, Share2, Copy, ExternalLink, Archive, AlertTriangle, LayoutGrid, List, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight } from "lucide-react";
    14→import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tabs";
    15→import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table";
    16→import { useAuth } from "@/contexts/AuthContext";
    17→import { ClientService, ClientWithAccess } from "@/lib/clientService";
    18→import { CampaignService, CampaignWithDetails } from "@/lib/campaignService";
    19→import { CampaignTemplateService, CampaignTemplateWithDetails } from "@/lib/campaignTemplateService";
    20→import { useSearchParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
    21→import { Checkbox } from "@/components/ui/checkbox";
    22→import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
    23→import { supabase } from "@/lib/supabase";
    24→import { CampaignKOLService } from "@/lib/campaignKolService";
    25→import { UserService } from '@/lib/userService';
    26→
    27→export default function CampaignsPage() {
    28→  const { user, userProfile } = useAuth();
    29→  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
    30→  const clientIdParam = searchParams.get('clientId');
    31→  const addParam = searchParams.get('add');
    32→  const [campaigns, setCampaigns] = useState<CampaignWithDetails[]>([]);
    33→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    34→  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
    35→  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState("");
    36→  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState<string>("Active");
    37→  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<"card" | "table">("card");
    38→  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1);
    39→  const itemsPerPage = 12;
    40→  const [isNewCampaignOpen, setIsNewCampaignOpen] = useState(false);
    41→  const [isSubmittingCampaign, setIsSubmittingCampaign] = useState(false);
    42→  const [isShareCampaignOpen, setIsShareCampaignOpen] = useState(false);
    43→  const [sharingCampaign, setSharingCampaign] = useState<CampaignWithDetails | null>(null);
    44→  const [isArchiveDialogOpen, setIsArchiveDialogOpen] = useState(false);
    45→  const [archivingCampaign, setArchivingCampaign] = useState<CampaignWithDetails | null>(null);
    46→  const [isArchiving, setIsArchiving] = useState(false);
    47→  const [availableClients, setAvailableClients] = useState<ClientWithAccess[]>([]);
    48→  const [availableTemplates, setAvailableTemplates] = useState<CampaignTemplateWithDetails[]>([]);
    49→  const [selectedTemplate, setSelectedTemplate] = useState<string>("none");
    50→  const [isLoadingTemplates, setIsLoadingTemplates] = useState(false);
    51→  const [availableLists, setAvailableLists] = useState<{ id: string; name: string }[]>([]);
    52→  const [selectedListId, setSelectedListId] = useState<string>("");
    53→  const [listKOLs, setListKOLs] = useState<{ master_kol_id: string; name: string; followers: number | null; region: string | null; platform: string[] | null }[]>([]);
    54→  const [selectedKolIds, setSelectedKolIds] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());
    55→  const [allUsers, setAllUsers] = useState<any[]>([]);
    56→  const [contentCounts, setContentCounts] = useState<{ [campaignId: string]: { total: number; posted: number } }>({});
    57→  const [paidContentCounts, setPaidContentCounts] = useState<{ [campaignId: string]: number }>({});
    58→  // In newCampaign state, add region, clientChoosingKols, multiActivation, intro_call, intro_call_date, budgetAllocations
    59→  const [newCampaign, setNewCampaign] = useState({
    60→    client_id: "",
    61→    name: "",
    62→    total_budget: "",
    63→    status: "Planning" as "Planning" | "Active" | "Paused" | "Completed",
    64→    start_date: "",
    65→    end_date: "",
    66→    description: "",
    67→    region: "apac",
    68→    clientChoosingKols: false,
    69→    multiActivation: false,
    70→    intro_call: false,
    71→    intro_call_date: undefined as string | undefined,
    72→    budgetAllocations: [] as { region: string; amount: string }[],
    73→    manager: "",
    74→  });
    75→
    76→  const router = useRouter();
    77→
    78→  useEffect(() => {
    79→    fetchCampaigns();
    80→  }, [user?.id, userProfile?.role]);
    81→
    82→  useEffect(() => {
    83→    if (isNewCampaignOpen && user?.id && userProfile?.role) {
    84→      fetchAvailableClients();
    85→      fetchAvailableTemplates();
    86→      fetchAvailableLists();
    87→      UserService.getAllUsers().then(setAllUsers);
    88→      // Set default manager to current user every time dialog opens
    89→      setNewCampaign(prev => ({ ...prev, manager: user.id }));
    90→    } else if (!isNewCampaignOpen) {
    91→      // Reset manager when dialog closes
    92→      setNewCampaign(prev => ({ ...prev, manager: user?.id || "" }));
    93→    }
    94→  }, [isNewCampaignOpen, user?.id, userProfile?.role]);
    95→
    96→  // Open dialog if add=1 is present
    97→  useEffect(() => {
    98→    if (addParam === '1' && userProfile) {
    99→      setIsNewCampaignOpen(true);
   100→      if (clientIdParam) {
   101→        setNewCampaign((prev) => ({ ...prev, client_id: clientIdParam }));
   102→      }
   103→    }
   104→  }, [addParam, clientIdParam, userProfile]);
   105→
   106→  const fetchAvailableClients = async () => {
   107→    try {
   108→      const clients = await ClientService.getClientsForUser(userProfile!.role as 'admin' | 'member' | 'client', user!.id);
   109→      setAvailableClients(clients);
   110→    } catch (err) {
   111→      console.error("Error fetching clients:", err);
   112→    }
   113→  };
   114→
   115→  const fetchAvailableTemplates = async () => {
   116→    try {
   117→      setIsLoadingTemplates(true);
   118→      const templates = await CampaignTemplateService.getTemplatesForUser(
   119→        userProfile!.role as 'admin' | 'member' | 'client',
   120→        user!.id
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-03-17 09:33:00Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./app/api/telegram/send/route.ts`

```text
     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
     2→import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
     3→
     4→export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';
     5→
     6→// Operations chat for internal notifications
     7→const OPERATIONS_CHAT_ID = '-1002636253963';
     8→
     9→// Initialize Supabase client
    10→const supabaseUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!;
    11→const supabaseKey = process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY || process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY!;
    12→const supabase = createClient(supabaseUrl, supabaseKey);
    13→
    14→/**
    15→ * Send a message to the HH Operations Telegram chat
    16→ * POST /api/telegram/send
    17→ */
    18→export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
    19→  try {
    20→    const body = await request.json();
    21→    const { message, chatId, threadId, useTerminalChat } = body;
    22→
    23→    if (!message) {
    24→      return NextResponse.json(
    25→        { error: 'Message is required' },
    26→        { status: 400 }
    27→      );
    28→    }
    29→
    30→    const botToken = process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;
    31→    if (!botToken) {
    32→      console.error('[Telegram Send] Bot token not configured');
    33→      return NextResponse.json(
    34→        { error: 'Telegram bot not configured' },
    35→        { status: 500 }
    36→      );
    37→    }
    38→
    39→    // Use terminal chat if requested, otherwise use provided chatId or default to operations chat
    40→    const terminalChatId = process.env.TELEGRAM_TERMINAL_CHAT_ID;
    41→    const targetChatId = useTerminalChat && terminalChatId ? terminalChatId : (chatId || OPERATIONS_CHAT_ID);
    42→
    43→    const messagePayload: any = {
    44→      chat_id: targetChatId,
    45→      text: message,
    46→      parse_mode: 'HTML'
    47→    };
    48→
    49→    // Add thread_id for topic-based messaging
    50→    // Use terminal thread ID if using terminal chat, otherwise use provided threadId
    51→    const terminalThreadId = process.env.TELEGRAM_TERMINAL_THREAD_ID;
    52→    const targetThreadId = useTerminalChat && terminalThreadId ? terminalThreadId : threadId;
    53→    if (targetThreadId) {
    54→      messagePayload.message_thread_id = parseInt(targetThreadId);
    55→    }
    56→
    57→    const response = await fetch(
    58→      `https://api.telegram.org/bot${botToken}/sendMessage`,
    59→      {
    60→        method: 'POST',
    61→        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    62→        body: JSON.stringify(messagePayload)
    63→      }
    64→    );
    65→
    66→    if (!response.ok) {
    67→      const error = await response.json();
    68→      console.error('[Telegram Send] Error:', error);
    69→      return NextResponse.json(
    70→        { error: 'Failed to send message', details: error },
    71→        { status: 500 }
    72→      );
    73→    }
    74→
    75→    const result = await response.json();
    76→    console.log('[Telegram Send] Message sent to chat:', targetChatId);
    77→
    78→    // Store the sent message in the database
    79→    try {
    80→      const botInfo = result.result?.from;
    81→      await supabase.from('telegram_messages').insert({
    82→        chat_id: targetChatId,
    83→        message_id: String(result.result?.message_id),
    84→        from_user_id: botInfo?.id ? String(botInfo.id) : null,
    85→        from_user_name: botInfo?.first_name || 'Bot',
    86→        from_username: botInfo?.username || null,
    87→        text: message,
    88→        message_date: new Date().toISOString()
    89→      });
    90→      console.log('[Telegram Send] Message stored in database');
    91→    } catch (dbError) {
    92→      // Log but don't fail the request if storage fails
    93→      console.error('[Telegram Send] Failed to store message:', dbError);
    94→    }
    95→
    96→    return NextResponse.json({
    97→      success: true,
    98→      message_id: result.result?.message_id
    99→    });
   100→  } catch (error) {
   101→    console.error('[Telegram Send] Error:', error);
   102→    return NextResponse.json(
   103→      { error: 'Internal server error' },
   104→      { status: 500 }
   105→    );
   106→  }
   107→}
   108→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-03-17 09:33:10Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./lib/chatService.ts`

```text
     1→import { supabase } from './supabase';
     2→import { Database } from './database.types';
     3→import { AIService } from './aiService';
     4→import { AgentOrchestrator, AgentResponse } from './agentOrchestrator';
     5→
     6→type ChatSession = Database['public']['Tables']['chat_sessions']['Row'];
     7→type ChatMessage = Database['public']['Tables']['chat_messages']['Row'];
     8→
     9→export interface ChatSessionWithMessages extends ChatSession {
    10→  messages: ChatMessage[];
    11→}
    12→
    13→export interface AgentChatMessage extends ChatMessage {
    14→  agent_actions?: any[];
    15→  agent_status?: 'thinking' | 'executing' | 'completed' | 'error';
    16→  execution_time_ms?: number;
    17→  is_agent_response?: boolean;
    18→}
    19→
    20→export class ChatService {
    21→  // Get all chat sessions for the current user
    22→  static async getChatSessions(): Promise<ChatSession[]> {
    23→    const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
    24→
    25→    if (!user) {
    26→      throw new Error('User not authenticated');
    27→    }
    28→
    29→    const { data, error } = await supabase
    30→      .from('chat_sessions')
    31→      .select('*')
    32→      .eq('user_id', user.id)
    33→      .order('updated_at', { ascending: false });
    34→
    35→    if (error) {
    36→      console.error('Error fetching chat sessions:', error);
    37→      throw error;
    38→    }
    39→
    40→    return data || [];
    41→  }
    42→
    43→  // Get a specific chat session with all messages
    44→  static async getChatSession(sessionId: string): Promise<ChatSessionWithMessages | null> {
    45→    const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
    46→
    47→    if (!user) {
    48→      throw new Error('User not authenticated');
    49→    }
    50→
    51→    const { data: session, error: sessionError } = await supabase
    52→      .from('chat_sessions')
    53→      .select('*')
    54→      .eq('id', sessionId)
    55→      .eq('user_id', user.id)
    56→      .single();
    57→
    58→    if (sessionError) {
    59→      console.error('Error fetching chat session:', sessionError);
    60→      throw sessionError;
    61→    }
    62→
    63→    if (!session) return null;
    64→
    65→    const { data: messages, error: messagesError } = await supabase
    66→      .from('chat_messages')
    67→      .select('*')
    68→      .eq('session_id', sessionId)
    69→      .order('created_at', { ascending: true });
    70→
    71→    if (messagesError) {
    72→      console.error('Error fetching chat messages:', messagesError);
    73→      throw messagesError;
    74→    }
    75→
    76→    return {
    77→      ...session,
    78→      messages: messages || []
    79→    };
    80→  }
    81→
    82→  // Create a new chat session
    83→  static async createChatSession(title?: string): Promise<ChatSession> {
    84→    const { data, error } = await supabase
    85→      .from('chat_sessions')
    86→      .insert({
    87→        title: title || 'New Chat',
    88→        user_id: (await supabase.auth.getUser()).data.user?.id
    89→      })
    90→      .select()
    91→      .single();
    92→
    93→    if (error) {
    94→      console.error('Error creating chat session:', error);
    95→      throw error;
    96→    }
    97→
    98→    // If no title was provided, update with the session ID
    99→    if (!title) {
   100→      const sessionId = data.id;
   101→      const newTitle = `Chat ${sessionId.slice(0, 8)}`;
   102→      await this.updateSessionTitle(sessionId, newTitle);
   103→      data.title = newTitle;
   104→    }
   105→
   106→    return data;
   107→  }
   108→
   109→  // Add a message to a chat session
   110→  static async addMessage(
   111→    sessionId: string,
   112→    role: 'user' | 'assistant' | 'system',
   113→    content: string,
   114→    metadata?: Record<string, any>,
   115→    supabaseClient?: any // Optional: pass authenticated client for server-side calls
   116→  ): Promise<ChatMessage> {
   117→    const client = supabaseClient || supabase;
   118→
   119→    const { data, error } = await client
   120→      .from('chat_messages')
   121→      .insert({
   122→        session_id: sessionId,
   123→        role,
   124→        content,
   125→        metadata: metadata || {}
   126→      })
   127→      .select()
   128→      .single();
   129→
   130→    if (error) {
   131→      console.error('Error adding message:', error);
   132→      throw error;
   133→    }
   134→
   135→    // Update the session's updated_at timestamp
   136→    await client
   137→      .from('chat_sessions')
   138→      .update({ updated_at: new Date().toISOString() })
   139→      .eq('id', sessionId);
   140→
   141→    return data;
   142→  }
   143→
   144→  // Update chat session title
   145→  static async updateSessionTitle(sessionId: string, title: string): Promise<void> {
   146→    const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
   147→
   148→    if (!user) {
   149→      throw new Error('User not authenticated');
   150→    }
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { supabase } from './supabase';
     2→import { generateUniqueSlug } from './slugUtils';

     4→// TypeScript types for Forms
     5→export type FormStatus = 'draft' | 'published' | 'closed';
     6→export type FieldType = 'text' | 'textarea' | 'email' | 'number' | 'select' | 'radio' | 'checkbox' | 'date' | 'section' | 'description';
     7→
     8→export interface Form {
     9→  id: string;
    10→  user_id: string;
    11→  name: string;
    12→  slug: string | null;
    13→  description: string | null;
    14→  status: FormStatus;
    15→  subdomain_enabled: boolean | null;
    16→  subdomain_url: string | null;
    17→  created_at: string;
    18→  updated_at: string;
    19→}
    20→
    21→export interface FormField {
    22→  id: string;
    23→  form_id: string;
    24→  field_type: FieldType;
    25→  label: string;
    26→  required: boolean;
    27→  options: string[] | null; // For select/radio/checkbox
    28→  allow_multiple: boolean | null; // Allow multiple answers
    29→  include_other: boolean | null; // Include "Other" option for select fields
    30→  allow_attachments: boolean | null; // Allow file attachments for text/textarea fields
    31→  is_yes_no_dropdown: boolean | null; // For select fields, indicates this is a Yes/No dropdown
    32→  require_yes_reason: boolean | null; // Require reason input when "Yes" is selected
    33→  require_no_reason: boolean | null; // Require reason input when "No" is selected
    34→  display_order: number;
    35→  page_number: number;
    36→  created_at: string;
    37→}
    38→
    39→export interface FormResponse {
    40→  id: string;
    41→  form_id: string;
    42→  response_data: Record<string, any>; // { field_id: value }
    43→  submitted_by_email: string | null;
    44→  submitted_by_name: string | null;
    45→  client_id: string | null;
    46→  client_name?: string | null;
    47→  submitted_at: string;
    48→}
    49→
    50→export interface FormWithFields extends Form {
    51→  fields: FormField[];
    52→}
    53→
    54→export interface FormWithStats extends Form {
    55→  response_count: number;
    56→}
    57→
    58→export interface CreateFormData {
    59→  name: string;
    60→  slug?: string;
    61→  description?: string;
    62→  status?: FormStatus;
    63→}
    64→
    65→export interface UpdateFormData {
    66→  id: string;
    67→  name?: string;
    68→  slug?: string | null;
    69→  description?: string | null;
    70→  status?: FormStatus;
    71→  subdomain_enabled?: boolean | null;
    72→  subdomain_url?: string | null;
    73→}
    74→
    75→export interface CreateFieldData {
    76→  form_id: string;
    77→  field_type: FieldType;
    78→  label: string;
    79→  required?: boolean;
    80→  options?: string[];
    81→  allow_multiple?: boolean;
    82→  include_other?: boolean;
    83→  allow_attachments?: boolean;
    84→  is_yes_no_dropdown?: boolean;
    85→  require_yes_reason?: boolean;
    86→  require_no_reason?: boolean;
    87→  display_order?: number;
    88→  page_number?: number;
    89→}
    90→
    91→export interface UpdateFieldData {

    95→  required?: boolean;

    97→  allow_multiple?: boolean | null;
```

```text
     1→'use client';
     2→
     3→import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
     4→import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
     5→import Image from 'next/image';
     6→import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
     7→import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';

     9→import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
    10→import { Select, SelectTrigger, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
    11→import { Checkbox } from '@/components/ui/checkbox';
```
